title: Mixed-dimensional quantum Monte Carlo studies of M-point moiré materials
comment: 23+72 pages, 9+32 figures, 3+2 tables. See also manuscript by Vasiliou et al
summary: A new moiré-material platform has recently been proposed based on twisting two-dimensional triangular-lattice monolayers whose low-energy states lie at the three M points of the Brillouin zone. Continuum models derived from extensive ab initio simulations suggest that electrons in the conduction bands of one such M-point moiré material, twisted AA-stacked SnSe$_2$, realize a three-orbital Hubbard model with orbitally-selective, quasi-one-dimensional (quasi-1D) hopping, protected by a projective mirror symmetry. Here, we show that the resulting "mixed-dimensional" limit -- in which the hopping is exactly quasi-1D in each valley, while the valleys are coupled by interactions into a fully two-dimensional network -- can be sampled with Stochastic Series Expansion (SSE) quantum Monte Carlo (QMC) without a sign problem at any filling. We develop an efficient new SSE QMC algorithm that combines custom global updates with parallel tempering to overcome the equilibration challenges posed by the mixed-dimensional setting. We then use this algorithm to explore the phase diagram of M-point twisted AA-stacked SnSe$_2$. Over extended and realistic ranges of twist angles and interaction strengths, we find that at integer fillings the system supports correlated insulators whose nature and strength depend strongly on angle. At certain commensurate fractional fillings, we further find evidence for Wigner-Mott insulators. We analytically account for the main features observed numerically using a strong-coupling description. Finally, we discuss perturbations away from the mixed-dimensional limit and the possibility of applying our method to other realizations of mixed-dimensional Hubbard models.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了基于扭曲AA堆叠SnSe₂的M点莫尔材料体系，发现其电子态可实现混合维Hubbard模型，并开发了一种无符号问题的SSE量子蒙特卡洛算法。通过数值模拟，揭示了该体系中随扭曲角度和相互作用强度变化的相关绝缘体相以及Wigner-Mott绝缘体相，并用强耦合理论解释了主要数值特征。
AI.motivation: 探索新型M点莫尔材料平台（扭曲三角晶格单层）中电子关联效应的丰富物理，特别是扭曲AA堆叠SnSe₂中轨道选择性准一维跳跃带来的混合维Hubbard模型，并解决该体系的数值模拟挑战。
AI.method: 基于连续模型推导出三轨道Hubbard模型；开发了结合自定义全局更新和并行回火的SSE QMC算法，该算法在任何填充下均无符号问题。
AI.result: 在广泛且真实的扭曲角度和相互作用强度范围内，整数填充下体系支持相关绝缘体，其性质强烈依赖于扭曲角度；在某些共度分数填充下发现了Wigner-Mott绝缘体的证据。
AI.conclusion: 该体系在混合维极限下展现出丰富的强关联物理，所开发的QMC算法可推广到其他混合维Hubbard模型实现中。

title: Spin correlations, low-energy scales, and anisotropy scaling in kagome frustrated magnets
summary: Neutron scattering is central to identifying quantum states of magnetic materials. In the search for quantum spin liquids, broad spectral features of inelastic spectra have been cited as evidence for spinon excitations, but can also arise from magnon excitations excitations in the presence of quenched disorder and strong magnon interactions. We develop a new approach to this problem, based on the adiabatic continuity in the $XXZ$ Heisenberg model on geometrically frustrating (GF) lattices as a function of the model's anisotropy. Using this approach, we identify universal features and energies of finite-temperature spin correlators. Focusing on the kagome lattice, we show that the low-energy spin spectral function contains robust, momentum-independent peaks with frequencies: $ω_1 \approx 3.4 T^*$ and $ω_2 \approx 6.3 T^*$, where the ``hidden energy scale'' $T^*$ is the characteristic scale of a low-temperature peak in the heat capacity, at which many GF magnets also display spin-glass freezing. We show that the spectral features at low energies $ω\lesssim T^*$ arise from single-magnon scattering and identify the magnetizations of the respective excitations. We explore the evolution of the spectral features with temperature and discuss extensions to other GF lattices. Our results provide a sharp spectroscopic criterion for interpreting neutron scattering in kagome and other GF quantum magnets.

AI.tldr: 本文基于XXZ海森堡模型的绝热连续性，在Kagome格点上识别出低能自旋谱函数中两个与动量无关的稳健峰值（ω₁≈3.4T*和ω₂≈6.3T*），为区分量子自旋液体中的自旋子激发与无序/强相互作用下的磁振子激发提供了光谱学判据。
AI.motivation: 中子散射是识别磁性材料量子态的核心手段，但量子自旋液体候选材料中的宽谱特征既可能来自自旋子激发，也可能来自淬灭无序和强磁振子相互作用下的磁振子激发。现有方法难以区分这两种机制，因此需要建立更清晰的光谱判据。
AI.method: 作者提出基于XXZ海森堡模型在几何阻挫晶格上随各向异性变化的绝热连续性方法，通过分析有限温度自旋关联函数的普适特征和能量标度，聚焦Kagome格点，识别出低能自旋谱函数中的动量无关峰，并关联到隐藏能量尺度T*（热容低温峰特征尺度）。
AI.result: 在Kagome格点上，低能自旋谱函数存在两个鲁棒的动量无关峰：ω₁≈3.4T*和ω₂≈6.3T*。低频（ω≲T*）谱特征来源于单磁振子散射，并确定了相应激发的磁化强度。还探讨了谱特征随温度的演化及向其他GF晶格的推广。
AI.conclusion: 该结果为解释Kagome及其他几何阻挫量子磁体的中子散射实验提供了清晰的光谱学判据，有助于区分自旋子激发与磁振子激发。

title: Cyclotron mass-selective de Haas-van Alphen measurements using temperature modulation
comment: 7 pages, 4 figures, supplementary material is appended to main article
summary: We present a temperature-modulated de Haas-van Alphen measurement technique that allows selective addressing of quantum oscillations with different effective masses $m^{\ast}$ using a non-monotonic amplitude evolution with temperature and magnetic field, governed by the temperature derivative of the Lifshitz-Kosevich factor. The technique relies on harmonic modulation of the sample temperature and phase-sensitive detection of quantum oscillations in the voltage induced in a pick-up coil. We use a set of frequencies with strong Zeeman-driven harmonic content in the compensated topological semimetal MoSi$_{2}$ as a natural linear mass comb ranging from 1$m^{\ast}$ to 13$m^{\ast}$ to demonstrate the tunability of the mass-dependent quantum oscillation amplitudes experimentally. The technique allows to reliably isolate weak contributions of heavy orbits that are inaccessible in conventional de Haas-van Alphen frequency spectra because their frequency peaks overlap with much stronger frequency peaks of lighter orbits.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种温度调制de Haas-van Alphen测量技术，通过非单调的振幅演化选择性区分不同有效质量的量子振荡，并成功在MoSi₂中分离出重轨道信号。
AI.motivation: 传统de Haas-van Alphen频谱中，重轨道的弱振荡信号往往被轻轨道的强信号峰掩盖，难以直接分离和识别。
AI.method: 采用温度谐波调制样品温度，结合锁相检测拾取线圈中的感应电压；利用Lifshitz-Kosevich因子的温度导数控制振幅随温度与磁场的非单调演化，实现质量依赖的振荡选择性增强。
AI.result: 在补偿型拓扑半金属MoSi₂中，利用Zeeman驱动谐波产生的1m*到13m*的线性质量梳，实验验证了该技术对质量依赖振荡幅度的可调性，成功分离了原本被掩盖的重轨道信号。
AI.conclusion: 该技术能够可靠地隔离传统方法无法获取的重轨道振荡信息，为研究复杂费米面中重有效质量电子态提供了有效手段。

title: Hidden antiferromagnetism, persistent valley fluctuations, and $U(6)$ crossovers in triangular-lattice M-point moiré materials via determinantal quantum Monte Carlo
comment: 7+49 pages, 4+27 figures, 1 table. See also manuscript by Calugaru et al
summary: A new moiré material platform was recently proposed based on twisting two-dimensional atomic monolayers whose low-energy states lie at the three M-points of the Brillouin Zone. Continuum and ab initio modeling suggest that electrons in the conduction bands of these materials realize three-valley Hubbard models with valley-selective, quasi-one-dimensional hopping. Remarkably, the onsite Hubbard repulsion is almost $U(6)$-symmetric without fine-tuning. Here, we show that this class of systems naturally admits sign-free determinantal Quantum Monte Carlo simulations at a filling of three electrons per moiré unit cell. We use these to explore the phase diagram for interactions of various strengths and $U(6)$-breaking anisotropies. We show that for near-isotropic interactions as relevant to, e.g., AA-stacked twisted SnSe$_2$, the system exhibits an extended intermediate-coupling regime in which local-moment formation and itinerancy compete, and the crossover to a putative low-temperature ordered state can be understood in terms of fluctuating $U(6)$ local moments. We argue that many of these features persist beyond the idealized sign-problem-free limit.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了一种基于扭转二维原子单层的新型莫尔材料平台，该平台的低能态位于布里渊区的三个M点。研究表明，这些材料的导带电子实现了具有谷选择、准一维跳变的三谷哈伯德模型，且在位哈伯德排斥具有近似的U(6)对称性。作者展示了该系统在每莫尔原胞三个电子的填充下自然允许无符号问题的行列式量子蒙特卡洛模拟，并利用该方法探索了不同相互作用强度和U(6)破缺各向异性下的相图。
AI.motivation: 探索新型扭转二维原子单层莫尔材料平台中谷物理与强关联效应的丰富物理现象，尤其是三谷哈伯德模型中的量子模拟与相图。
AI.method: 使用无符号问题的行列式量子蒙特卡洛模拟，结合连续模型和从头算建模，研究三谷哈伯德模型在不同相互作用强度和U(6)破缺各向异性下的行为。
AI.result: 在近各向同性相互作用下（如AA堆叠扭转SnSe₂），系统表现出一个扩展的中间耦合区域，其中局域矩形成与巡游性相互竞争，向低温有序态的交叉可由涨落的U(6)局域矩理解。
AI.conclusion: 这类系统在理想的无符号问题极限之外仍保留许多关键特征，为研究莫尔材料中的强关联物理提供了新的理论框架和计算方法。

title: Charting the emergent low-dimensional manifold of quantum materials
summary: The periodic table of elements transformed chemistry by revealing simple organizing principles underlying atomic behavior. Despite decades of effort, no analogous framework has emerged for crystalline materials -- their microscopic complexity and vast configurational space have defied reduction to fundamental organizing principles. Current databases catalog thousands of synthesized materials, but extracting predictive, interpretable models from this wealth of data remains a formidable challenge. Here we demonstrate that the materials landscape possesses a hidden geometric organization that can be unveiled through unsupervised nonlinear dimensionality reduction. Applying differential geometry techniques to the Inorganic Crystal Structure Database (ICSD), we reveal that just a few combinations of microscopic descriptors capture the vast majority of variance in material properties. This low-dimensional embedding autonomously segregates superconductors from ordinary materials and further distinguishes superconducting families in ways that transcend chemical similarity alone. Remarkably, the discovered geometric organization directly governs critical temperatures ($T_c$) across diverse superconducting families, enabling accurate $T_c$ predictions without any knowledge of the pairing mechanism. Our approach uncovers emergent organizing principles that control macroscopic quantum behavior, offering a new paradigm in how we build models of complex quantum materials directly from experimental data.

AI.tldr: 本文通过无监督非线性降维技术，揭示了晶体材料隐藏的几何结构，仅用少数微观描述符即可解释材料性质的大部分方差，并成功预测超导体的临界温度。
AI.motivation: 当前缺乏类似元素周期表那样能够揭示晶体材料组织原则的框架，尽管存在大量数据库，但从中提取可预测、可解释的模型仍是重大挑战。
AI.method: 应用无监督非线性降维（微分几何技术）对无机晶体结构数据库（ICSD）进行分析，找出低维嵌入空间，自动分离超导材料并区分不同超导家族。
AI.result: 少量微观描述符组合即可解释材料性质大部分方差；低维嵌入能自动区分超导体与普通材料，且不同超导家族的区分超越了化学相似性；该几何结构可直接预测临界温度 Tc。
AI.conclusion: 发现了一种控制宏观量子行为的新兴组织原则，为直接从实验数据构建复杂量子材料模型提供了新范式。

title: Feature-preserving Latent-EnKF for Data Assimilation of Flows with Shocks
summary: The ensemble Kalman filter (EnKF) is widely adopted for sequential data assimilation, but fails for solutions with discontinuities, such as shocks in compressible flows. Uncertainty in shock location induces multimodal ensemble statistics that violate the Gaussian assumptions underlying the EnKF, producing large-scale spurious oscillations in the analysis state. We introduce a feature-preserving latent-EnKF that performs the ensemble update in a learned low-dimensional latent space, where shock and flow features admit a smooth manifold representation, thereby preserving sharp features during EnKF analysis. The updated latent state is mapped back to physical state through a shared decoder for all ensemble members. The algorithm eliminates the member-specific ordered training and positivity flooring used in prior approaches. Numerical experiments on a Sod shock tube and Mach 2 shock interaction with a 2D cylinder, using sparse and noisy observations, show accurate feature recovery of shocks and contact discontinuities without spurious oscillations.

AI.tldr: 针对EnKF在处理具有间断性（如激波）的流场时产生的振荡问题，本文提出了一种特征保持的潜在空间EnKF方法，通过在学习的低维潜在空间中进行集合更新，保留激波和流动特征，消除了非物理振荡。
AI.motivation: 标准EnKF在压缩流等具有间断性的解中失效，激波位置不确定性导致多模态集合统计，违反EnKF的高斯假设，产生大尺度伪振荡。
AI.method: 提出特征保持的潜在空间EnKF（feature-preserving latent-EnKF），在学习的低维潜在空间中执行集合更新，使激波和流动特征呈现光滑流形表示；通过共享解码器将更新后的潜在状态映射回物理状态，无需成员特定的有序训练和正性处理。
AI.result: 在Sod激波管和Mach 2激波与二维圆柱相互作用的数值实验中，使用稀疏含噪观测，能准确恢复激波和接触间断，无伪振荡。
AI.conclusion: 潜在空间EnKF有效处理了间断性问题，避免了传统EnKF的震荡缺陷，是一种可行的特征保持数据同化方法。

title: From Loss Diagnosis to Rational Design: A Unified Analytical Model for Photoelectrochemical Cells
comment: 43 pages total: 19-page main text with 4 figures and 2 tables; 24-page Supplementary Information with 7 figures and 8 tables
summary: Photoelectrochemical (PEC) cells are a compelling route to solar-driven chemical energy storage and feedstock synthesis, yet their deployment is hindered by coupled losses spanning light absorption, carrier transport, interfacial charge transfer, and semiconductor-electrolyte matching. Existing models address these losses in an architecture-specific manner and fall short of quantitative experimental diagnosis or actionable design guidance. Here, we introduce a unified loss-analysis framework applicable to both built-in junction (BIJ) and semiconductor-electrolyte junction (SEJ) photoelectrodes within a consistent set of physically meaningful parameters. The framework delivers current-voltage curves and efficiency metrics under ideal and real conditions, constructing efficiency maps to delineate theoretical limits and material-selection windows. Critically, by fitting experimental current-voltage data, it enables quantitative energy-loss decomposition into thermodynamic, optical, recombination, and interfacial contributions, pinpointing performance bottlenecks in real devices and mapping them directly onto optimization strategies such as co-catalyst integration or nanostructuring. Energy flows are visualized through Sankey diagrams, providing an intuitive picture of how incident solar energy is absorbed, dissipated, or converted into chemical output. Validated against state-of-the-art literature results spanning solar water splitting, CO2 reduction, NH3 synthesis, and solar redox flow batteries, the framework further enables systematic comparison of photovoltaic-grade absorbers (e.g., Si, perovskites) with intermediate-bandgap semiconductors (e.g., hematite, BiVO4), identifying key factors limiting each material class. Together, these capabilities support a paradigm shift from empirical optimization to mechanism-informed rational design of high-efficiency PEC energy-conversion systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个统一的光电化学（PEC）电池损耗分析框架，能够定量分解热力学、光学、复合和界面贡献的损失，并通过效率图谱和桑基图直观展示能量流动，为高效PEC系统的理性设计提供指导。
AI.motivation: 现有PEC电池模型针对特定架构设计，缺乏统一的定量实验诊断方法和可操作的设计指导，难以系统性地解决光吸收、载流子传输、界面电荷转移等多方面的耦合损耗问题。
AI.method: 建立了一个适用于内置结（BIJ）和半导体-电解质结（SEJ）光电极的统一损耗分析框架，通过拟合实验电流-电压数据，将能量损失分解为热力学、光学、复合和界面贡献，并构建效率图谱和桑基图进行可视化。
AI.result: 该框架在太阳能水分解、CO2还原、NH3合成和太阳能氧化还原液流电池等多个领域的文献结果中得到验证，能够系统比较不同光伏级和中间带隙半导体材料，识别各类材料的关键限制因素。
AI.conclusion: 该框架推动了从经验优化向机制驱动的理性设计范式转变，为高效PEC能量转换系统提供了定量诊断和优化策略的实用工具。

title: Influence-solvability: a systematic theory of $(1+1)D$ solvability and its application to brickwork circuits
summary: `Solvable' circuits, such as dual unitaries and its generalisations, have arisen as paradigmatic examples of tractable chaotic non-equilibrium dynamics, both in classical and quantum systems. However, while increasingly more complicated sufficient conditions have been proposed, a systematic theory classifying and understanding general features of solvable circuits is missing. We develop such a theory by introducing influence-solvable circuits, a class of $(1+1)D$ circuits whose influence matrix, which represents the `bath' generated by its own evolution, is given by a uniform MPS with finite bond-dimension $χ$. This property allows for efficient computation of subsystem dynamics and essentially contains all known examples of solvable circuits. We derive a set of necessary and sufficient local conditions by using a version of the fundamental theorem of MPS for open boundary conditions. Next we apply our theory to brickwork circuits with $χ=1$ influence-solvability and perform a systematic classification of classical brickwork circuits with local dimension up to $d=3$ and quantum brickwork circuits with $d=2$. Our search reveals new solvable circuits that are not captured by known solvability conditions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"影响可解电路"理论，通过影响矩阵的均匀MPS表示（有限键维数χ）统一刻画(1+1)D可解电路，推导了局部充要条件，并对χ=1的砖墙电路进行了系统分类，发现了新的可解电路。
AI.motivation: 现有可解电路（如对偶酉及其推广）缺乏系统性的理论框架来分类和理解可解电路的一般特征，需要建立统一的理论。
AI.method: 引入影响-可解电路概念，利用影响矩阵的均匀MPS表示；通过开放边界条件下的MPS基本定理推导局部充要条件；对砖墙电路进行系统性分类搜索（经典d≤3，量子d=2）。
AI.result: 建立了影响可解电路的理论框架，推导了局部充要条件；系统分类发现了新的可解电路，这些电路无法被已知的可解性条件所捕获。
AI.conclusion: 影响-可解电路提供了一个统一的理论框架来理解和分类(1+1)D可解混沌电路，为发现新的可解电路提供了系统方法。

title: Composite Quantum Geometry and Semiclassical Dynamics
summary: We derive semiclassical equations of motion for general composite bound states in insulators and semiconductors, covering excitations such as excitons and trions. For neutral composites we find that a uniform external electric field does not couple to a Berry curvature term, contrary to the naive expectation from single-electron dynamics. Instead, a distinct quantum geometric quantity appears generically in the equations of motion. This quantity is the difference between inequivalent Berry connections that can be defined for the composite, generalising the concept of the quantum geometric dipole previously studied for excitons. In the case of charged composites such as trions, we find an additional Berry curvature contribution to the equations of motion. As we demonstrate, however, there is an infinite family of inequivalent composite Berry curvatures, and so care must be taken to make the correct choice that describes the physical dynamics. We explain how this choice should be made dependent on the definition of a spatial centre for the composite. We end by discussing composite dynamics that have no single-electron counterpart. We find that trions in magic-angle twisted bilayer graphene undergo a transverse drift under an applied electric field and that this is driven not only by the Berry curvature contribution but also by the quantum geometric dipole. The interplay of these two geometric contributions further imprints itself on the trion's internal dynamics, causing its dipole moment to oscillate in time.

AI.tldr: 本文推导了绝缘体和半导体中一般复合束缚态（如激子和三激子）的半经典运动方程，发现中性复合体在均匀电场中不耦合Berry曲率项，而是出现量子几何偶极子等新几何量；带电复合体则需谨慎选择Berry曲率定义。以魔角扭曲双层石墨烯中的三激子为例，展示了电场驱动的横向漂移及几何量对内部动力学的调控。
AI.motivation: 现有单电子半经典动力学理论（含Berry曲率）无法直接推广到复合束缚态（如激子、三激子），需要建立描述这些复合粒子在外场下运动的理论框架。
AI.method: 从量子力学出发，利用半经典近似推导复合束缚态的运动方程；引入量子几何偶极子（Berry联络之差）的概念；分析不同复合体（中性/带电）中Berry曲率的角色，并讨论空间中心定义对Berry曲率选择的影响。
AI.result: 中性复合体：均匀电场不耦合Berry曲率，而是耦合量子几何偶极子；带电复合体：存在Berry曲率贡献，但需根据空间中心定义选取正确的Berry曲率；三激子在魔角扭曲双层石墨烯中同时受Berry曲率和量子几何偶极子驱动产生横向漂移，且内部偶极矩呈现时间振荡。
AI.conclusion: 复合粒子的半经典动力学需要引入新的几何量（量子几何偶极子），不能简单套用单电子Berry曲率框架；实际体系（如MATBG中的三激子）展现了多几何量耦合的丰富动力学行为。

title: Hierarchical Interdiffusion Kinetics in Nanoscale Ni/Al Multilayers
summary: Nanoscale mass transport governs the onset of intermetallic formation in reactive metallic multilayers, yet the underlying mechanisms remain poorly understood. Here, we combine fast differential scanning calorimetry (FDSC) of free-standing Ni/Al multilayers (20 nm bilayer thickness) with correlative STEM to resolve the early interdiffusion regime. Varying the heating rate over five orders of magnitude (0.1 to 10,000 K/s) enables isoconversional Kissinger-Akahira-Sunose (KAS) analysis, linking heat-flow signatures to microstructural evolution. The as-deposited multilayers are nanocrystalline and exhibit pronounced premixing, with significant Ni enrichment throughout the Al layers. Upon annealing, mass transport proceeds hierarchically: at low temperatures, Ni diffusion is confined to Al grain boundaries (~81 kJ/mol), while at higher temperatures lattice diffusion from grain boundaries into the grain interiors becomes active (~168 kJ/mol), leading to increased mass transport and heat release. These findings identify grain boundaries as the dominant transport pathways controlling reaction onset and as key microstructural design parameters in reactive multilayers. By providing access to transient kinetic regimes and intermediate states, the combined FDSC-microscopy approach opens new opportunities for studying defect-mediated transport and non-equilibrium phase transformations.

AI.tldr: 本文通过快速差示扫描量热法（FDSC）与STEM联用，解析了Ni/Al多层膜中早期互扩散的动力学机制，发现质量传输呈现层级性：低温下Ni沿Al晶界扩散（~81 kJ/mol），高温下晶界向晶内体扩散（~168 kJ/mol），晶界是控制反应起始的主导路径。
AI.motivation: 纳米尺度质量传输控制着反应性金属多层膜中金属间化合物的形成，但其潜在机制仍不清楚。作者希望通过实验手段解析早期互扩散过程。
AI.method: 采用快速差示扫描量热法（FDSC）对自支撑Ni/Al多层膜（20 nm双层厚度）进行测量，结合关联STEM显微分析。通过跨越五个数量级的加热速率（0.1至10,000 K/s），利用等转化率的Kissinger-Akahira-Sunose（KAS）分析，将热流信号与微结构演变关联起来。
AI.result: 沉积态多层膜为纳米晶且存在显著预混合，Al层中Ni富集明显。退火时质量传输呈层级性：低温下Ni扩散局限于Al晶界（~81 kJ/mol），高温下晶界向晶内体扩散被激活（~168 kJ/mol），导致质量传输和热释放增加。
AI.conclusion: 晶界是控制反应起始的主导传输路径，是反应性多层膜中的关键微结构设计参数。FDSC-显微联用方法为研究缺陷介导传输和非平衡相变提供了新途径。

title: Hall conductivity reveals the nature of quantum coherence in strongly correlated metals
summary: Linear-in-temperature resistivity is a hallmark for strange metallic transport, and appears universally in many strongly correlated electron systems. However, the focus on the longitudinal channel often overshadows the profound microscopic insights contained within the transverse response. Here, we utilize numerically exact determinantal quantum Monte Carlo simulations of the doped Hubbard model in a magnetic field to calculate longitudinal and transverse transport. We demonstrate that while the resistivity is robustly $T$-linear across parameter sets, the Hall response is highly sensitive to particle-hole asymmetry, Fermi surface topology, and many-body correlation effects. Specifically, the combination of these effects determine a crossover scale in which the system becomes quantum-coherent, and is reflected in the Hall conductivity. Our results demonstrate that while the $T$-linearity in resistivity appears universal, the Hall response reveals a crossover from semi-classical to quantum-coherent transport otherwise masked in the longitudinal channel.

AI.tldr: 本文通过确定性的量子蒙特卡洛模拟，研究了掺杂Hubbard模型在磁场下的纵向和横向输运性质，发现电阻率的T-线性行为具有普遍性，而霍尔响应对粒子-空穴不对称性、费米面拓扑和多体关联效应高度敏感，揭示了从半经典到量子相干输运的交叉行为。
AI.motivation: 纵向电阻率T-线性行为在奇异金属中普遍存在，但横向（霍尔）响应中蕴含的微观物理信息常被忽视，作者希望通过对霍尔响应的研究揭示更深层的输运机理。
AI.method: 采用精确的确定性子量子蒙特卡洛模拟（determinantal quantum Monte Carlo），对掺杂Hubbard模型在磁场下的纵向和横向输运性质进行计算。
AI.result: 电阻率在不同参数下均表现出稳健的T-线性行为；霍尔响应对粒子-空穴不对称性、费米面拓扑及多体关联效应高度敏感；这些效应共同决定了系统进入量子相干输运的交叉标度，并反映在霍尔电导率中。
AI.conclusion: 电阻率的T-线性行为具有普适性，但霍尔响应能够揭示纵向通道中无法看到的从半经典到量子相干输运的交叉行为，为理解奇异金属的微观物理提供了新视角。

title: Dynamical Control of Superconductivity in Superconductor-Ferromagnet Bilayers
comment: Main text: 5.5 pages, 3 figures. Supplementary material: 4 pages, 3 figures
summary: We study a simplified model of a ferromagnetic metal proximitized by a fully-gapped $s-$wave superconductor and integrated with a microwave resonator. The low-energy excitations in the combined system consist of ferromagnetic magnons, Bogoliubov excitations of the superconductor, and cavity photons. We show here that when the magnons and photons have comparable frequencies and are subject to an external drive, the hybridized driven magnon-polaritons induce a non-equilibrium crossover from the expected proximitized nodal $p-$wave superconductor to a fully gapped $(p_x+ip_y)-$superconductor. Moreover, the characteristic crossover temperature is inversely related to the magnon-photon detuning. We compute the temperature-dependent renormalization of the cavity photon frequencies across this nodal to nodeless evolution, which modifies the kinetic inductance of the resonator, and find a number of non-trivial features tied to the non-equilibrium (i.e., driven) nature of the problem. We compare and contrast these results with a recent circuit quantum electrodynamics (cQED) based experiment studying a permalloy-niobium bilayer, where a non-trivial dependence of the low-temperature cavity response on the magnon-photon detuning was observed. Our results pave the way for a principled exploration of engineering novel states of matter by coupling cavity photons to electronic collective modes in correlated two-dimensional materials and interfaces.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了铁磁金属与s波超导体近邻化并集成微波谐振腔的简化模型，发现当磁子和光子频率相近并施加外部驱动时，杂化驱动的磁子-极化激元会导致从预期的节线p波超导体转变为全能隙的(p_x+ip_y)超导体，且转变温度与磁子-光子失谐成反比。该结果与近期cQED实验观测到的低温腔响应对磁子-光子失谐的非平凡依赖关系一致。
AI.motivation: 探索通过将腔光子与电子集体模式耦合来工程化新型物质态，理解驱动非平衡条件下磁子-光子杂化对超导配对对称性的影响，并解释近期cQED实验中观察到的反常低温腔响应。
AI.method: 建立铁磁金属/s波超导体近邻化体系与微波谐振腔耦合的理论模型，分析低能激发（磁子、Bogoliubov激发、腔光子）的杂化行为，在驱动非平衡条件下研究磁子-极化激元对超导配对态的影响。
AI.result: 驱动杂化磁子-极化激元诱导超导态从节线p波转变为全能隙(p_x+ip_y)波；转变温度与磁子-光子失谐成反比；腔光子频率随温度的重整化展现非平凡特征，与实验观察定性一致。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为通过腔光子与二维材料及相关界面中的电子集体模式耦合来工程化新型量子物态提供了原则性探索路径。

title: REMAL: Residual Equilibrium Manifold Active Learning for Surrogate-Based Multidisciplinary Design Analysis
summary: Multidisciplinary design analysis of coupled engineering systems requires the computation of equilibrium states in which all disciplinary coupling variables are mutually consistent. Conventional fixed-point iteration resolves this consistency problem separately at each design point, which can become expensive when disciplinary evaluations are costly and many analyses are required in outer-loop tasks such as multidisciplinary design optimization, uncertainty quantification, or digital twin updating. This paper introduces REMAL, a residual manifold surrogate modeling framework for coupled systems. Instead of approximating each discipline independently or directly learning converged coupling variables, the proposed method learns a surrogate model of the joint residual manifold via multitask Gaussian process models. An entropy-based active learning strategy selects additional residual evaluations near uncertain zero-contour regions, and equilibrium states for new design inputs are recovered by solving a nonlinear least squares optimization problem using only the trained surrogate. The method is evaluated on four engineering coupled system benchmarks: a satellite model, an aerostructural model, a finite-element gas-turbine heat-transfer and economics model, and a modified turbine model with added feedback coupling. Across these cases, REMAL consistently demonstrates the cost effectiveness when repeated evaluations of the fixed point across the design space are necessary. Theoretically, we show that, under mild assumptions, REMAL's predictive fixed point error is bounded.

AI.tldr: 本文提出REMAL框架，通过多任务高斯过程代理联合残差流形，结合熵主动学习策略，高效求解多学科耦合系统的平衡状态，在多个工程基准测试中验证了其成本效益，并给出了理论误差界。
AI.motivation: 多学科耦合系统在设计优化、不确定性量化等场景中需反复求解平衡状态，传统定点迭代法每次设计点单独求解代价高昂，亟需一种高效的代理建模方法替代昂贵的逐点迭代计算。
AI.method: 提出REMAL框架：1) 使用多任务高斯过程模型学习耦合系统的联合残差流形；2) 基于熵的主动学习策略在不确定的零等高线区域选取额外残差评估点；3) 对于新设计输入，通过仅使用训练好的代理模型求解非线性最小二乘优化问题恢复平衡状态。
AI.result: 在卫星模型、气动结构模型、燃气轮机有限元传热与经济模型及带反馈耦合的改进涡轮机模型四个基准测试中，REMAL均展现出显著的成本效益。
AI.conclusion: 在温和假设下，REMAL的预测固定点误差有界，表明该方法在多学科设计空间需要重复评估平衡状态时是一种高效且可靠的替代方案。

title: Fine-tuning MLIP foundation models: strategies for accuracy and transferability
summary: Adapting machine-learned interatomic potential (MLIP) foundation models to specialised tasks through fine-tuning is an increasingly important practice, yet systematic guidance on when and how to fine-tune is currently limited. We evaluate seven fine-tuning strategies -- naive full-parameter updates, two layer-freezing variants, Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA), multihead replay, pseudolabelled replay, and replay combined with LoRA -- across five chemically diverse benchmarks (aqueous NaCl, ice polymorphs, S$_\mathrm{N}$2 reactions, SPICE biomolecules, and lithium electrolytes), three generations of foundation models, and training sets spanning five orders of magnitude. To support this evaluation we implement three capabilities in the MACE codebase: LoRA adapted for equivariant message-passing architectures, including both scalar and equivariant linear layers; pseudolabelled replay, which decouples the replay data source from the original pretraining corpus; and model-aware atomic reference energy (E0) reestimation for fine-tuning workflows. We find that foundation model quality, correct E0 initialisation, and well-chosen hyperparameters are prerequisites whose impact routinely exceeds that of the fine-tuning strategy itself. Once these prerequisites are met, most strategies achieve strong target-task accuracy, consistently surpassing models trained from scratch. The practical distinction depends on deployment scope: naive fine-tuning offers the best convergence for single-system applications, while multihead replay -- with either original or pseudolabelled data -- is the only approach tested that consistently preserves out-of-distribution robustness, maintaining both pretraining-distribution accuracy for broader deployment and many-body short-range repulsion.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了七种微调策略在五种化学基准、三代基础模型上的表现，发现基础模型质量、能量参考值初始化和超参数选择比微调策略本身更重要；在满足前提后，大多数策略都能达到强目标任务精度；实际区分在于部署范围：朴素微调适合单一系统，多头重放（含伪标签重放）是唯一能保持分布外鲁棒性的方法。
AI.motivation: 将机器学习原子间势基础模型通过微调适配到特定任务日益重要，但目前缺乏关于何时以及如何微调的系统性指导。
AI.method: 评估七种微调策略（朴素全参数更新、两种冻结层变体、LoRA、多头重放、伪标签重放、重放+LoRA），在五种化学基准、三代基础模型、横跨五个数量级的训练集上进行测试；在MACE代码库中实现了三项新功能：适配等变消息传递架构的LoRA、伪标签重放、模型感知的原子参考能量重估计。
AI.result: 基础模型质量、正确的E0初始化和良好选择的超参数是前提条件，其影响通常超过微调策略本身；满足前提后，大多数策略都能达到强目标任务精度，持续超越从零训练的模型；朴素微调在单系统应用中收敛最佳，多头重放（原始或伪标签数据）是唯一能保持分布外鲁棒性的方法。
AI.conclusion: 微调策略的选择取决于部署范围：单系统应用首选朴素微调，需要保持分布外鲁棒性的更广泛应用则推荐多头重放。

title: The formation of magnetic reentrancy in the Ising model on a decorated square lattice
summary: In our work, based on an exact solution of the Ising model on a decorated square lattice with an arbitrary number of decorating spins, we have demonstrated the fundamental possibility of describing the phenomenon of multiple magnetic phase transitions (magnetic reentrancy) in the regime of competing exchange interactions. We analyzed the magnetic behavior of the system and established the conditions for the occurrence of magnetic reentrancy. We have determined the relationships of the model parameter under which the formation of one, three, and even five magnetic phase transitions is possible, which is confirmed by a complicated magnetic phase diagram. We have also proposed a unique method for finding critical temperatures that allows for the precise determination of their number and values, including those at extremely low temperatures.

AI.tldr: 本文通过在装饰方格晶格上精确求解Ising模型，证明了在竞争交换相互作用下多重磁相变（磁重入现象）存在的可能性，分析了磁行为并确定了出现1、3甚至5次磁相变的条件，同时提出了一种精确确定临界温度（包括极低温下）的方法。
AI.motivation: 探索在竞争交换相互作用条件下，多重磁相变（磁重入现象）是否能够被描述和解释，并在装饰方格晶格Ising模型框架下给出严格的数学证明。
AI.method: 基于装饰方格晶格上任意数量装饰自旋的Ising模型精确解，分析系统磁行为，建立模型参数与磁重入条件的关系，并提出一种新的临界温度确定方法。
AI.result: 确定了在特定模型参数关系下，系统可以出现1次、3次甚至5次磁相变，并通过复杂的磁相图验证了这一发现。提出的方法能够精确确定临界温度的数量和数值，包括极低温区域。
AI.conclusion: 从理论上证明了竞争交换作用下磁重入现象（多次磁相变）的存在可行性，为理解复杂磁性材料中的多重相变行为提供了理论基础和精确分析工具。

title: Optical pulse-induced quantum geometric waves in graphene
summary: We show that, under a short optical pulse, the quantum metric of Bloch states in the momentum-time (kx, ky , t) of graphene becomes dynamic and exhibits a wave-like behavior near Dirac points. This quantum metric wave reflects the Floquet-band structure caused by the pulse, as revealed by solving the time-dependent Schrödinger equation assuming that correlations and out-of-equilibrium effects can be ignored. The momentum and temporal components of the metric have very distinct time dependence that persists even after the pulse has passed. In addition, the pulse also generates a Berry curvature wave that is otherwise absent in static graphene. The time-dependent electron densities in conduction and valence bands also give arise to a Fisher information wave that constitutes part of the quantum metric wave, and is readily measurable by pump-probe experiments.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了在短光脉冲作用下，石墨烯中布洛赫态的量子度量在动量-时间空间中表现出波动行为，并伴随贝里曲率波和费希尔信息波的产生，这些效应在脉冲过后仍持续存在且可被实验测量。
AI.motivation: 探索超短光脉冲诱导下石墨烯中量子几何性质的动态演化，特别是量子度量、贝里曲率和费希尔信息在时间维度上的非平凡行为。
AI.method: 通过求解含时薛定谔方程（忽略关联和非平衡效应），分析石墨烯狄拉克点附近布洛赫态的量子度量在动量-时间空间中的动力学特性，以及由此产生的Floquet能带结构。
AI.result: 量子度量在脉冲后表现出波状行为并持续存在；动量分量与时间分量具有显著不同的时间依赖性；脉冲还诱导出原本不存在的贝里曲率波；导带和价带的电子密度变化产生费希尔信息波。
AI.conclusion: 量子度量波反映了脉冲诱导的Floquet能带结构，且费希尔信息波可通过泵浦-探测实验直接测量，为研究光与物质相互作用中的量子几何提供了新途径。

title: Compositional gradient engineering for enhanced ferroelectricity in ultrathin AlScN
summary: Ferroelectric AlScN is promising for CMOS-compatible non-volatile memory, but thickness scaling is limited by leakage, premature breakdown, and defect-mediated failure. Here we show that compositional grading within a continuous wurtzite AlN-AlScN lattice mitigates these limitations by distributing structural and polarization discontinuities across the film thickness, reducing defect formation and local field concentration. In a 20 nm graded heterostructure, monotonic Sc incorporation and AlN-rich boundaries produce reversible ferroelectric switching, an as-grown metal-polar state, a 21% higher breakdown field, 10% enhanced remanent polarization, and 40x higher resistivity relative to homogeneous AlScN. Time-domain PUND measurements reveal strongly suppressed post-switching leakage, consistent with reduced defect-assisted and polarization-coupled conduction. This improved dielectric robustness enables ferroelectric functionality in 5 nm graded stacks containing only a 2 nm $\mathrm{Al}_{0.64}\mathrm{Sc}_{0.36}\mathrm{N}$ region, with measurable switching near 1 V. These results establish compositional grading as a defect- and field-management strategy for scalable ultrathin wurtzite ferroelectrics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过在AlN-AlScN连续纤锌矿结构中引入成分梯度，有效缓解了铁电薄膜的漏电、击穿和缺陷问题。20nm梯度异质结构展现出可逆铁电开关、21%更高的击穿场强、10%增强的剩余极化和40倍更高的电阻率。甚至在5nm超薄堆叠中（仅含2nm Al₀.₆₄Sc₀.₃₆N）仍可实现近1V的开关行为，证明成分梯度是一种可扩展的超薄纤锌矿铁电体的缺陷与电场管理策略。
AI.motivation: 铁电AlScN在CMOS兼容非易失性存储器中前景广阔，但其厚度缩放受限于漏电、过早击穿和缺陷介导的失效，亟需一种能克服这些限制的工程策略。
AI.method: 在连续纤锌矿AlN-AlScN晶格中，通过单调Sc掺入和AlN-rich边界构建成分梯度异质结构，使结构和极化不连续性分布在整个膜厚中，减少缺陷形成和局部电场集中。
AI.result: 20nm梯度结构实现：21%更高的击穿场强、10%增强的剩余极化、40倍更高的电阻率、显著抑制开关后漏电。5nm超薄堆叠（仅2nm Al₀.₆₄Sc₀.₃₆N）在近1V下仍可测量到铁电开关行为。
AI.conclusion: 成分梯度是一种有效的缺陷与电场管理策略，可实现可扩展的超薄纤锌矿铁电体，推动AlScN基非易失性存储器向更高密度、更低电压方向发展。

title: Selective stabilization of antiferromagnetic orders in FeTe films via local strain engineering
summary: The parent compound FeTe hosts a complex magnetic landscape that is highly susceptible to lattice distortions. Although theoretical models have predicted a bicollinear to dimer antiferromagnetic (AFM) phase transition under tensile strain, its experimental realization and deterministic control has remained elusive owing to severe magnetic frustration. Here, combining high-resolution scanning tunneling microscopy (STM) and density functional theory (DFT) calculations, we demonstrate the selective stabilization of bicollinear and dimer AFM orders in few-layer FeTe films via local uniaxial strain engineering. By mapping the strain fields near dislocation areas in FeTe films and FeTe/FeSe heterostructures, we establish a direct correspondence between specific strain components and the resulting magnetic ground states. We find that uniaxial compression along the Fe-Fe next-nearest-neighbor direction stabilizes the bicollinear AFM order, with the stripe orientation aligning parallel to the compression axis. Crucially, we report the experimental realization of the long-range dimer AFM order, which emerges under anisotropic strain along the Fe-Fe nearest-neighbor direction. This phase manifests as a distinct $\sqrt{2} \times \sqrt{2}$ electronic reconstruction and shares a common Neel temperature with the bicollinear phase. Our findings reveal that anisotropic strain effectively lifts the magnetic degeneracy among competing states. This work provides a robust strategy for the manipulation of elusive magnetic orders and offers insights into the interplay between lattice, spin, and electronic degrees of freedom in iron-based superconductors.

AI.tldr: 本文通过STM和DFT计算，在少层FeTe薄膜中利用局域单轴应变工程，实现了双共线（bicollinear）和二聚体（dimer）两种反铁磁序的选择性稳定，并首次实验实现了长程二聚体反铁磁序，揭示了各向异性应变可有效解除磁基态简并。
AI.motivation: FeTe具有复杂的磁序且对晶格畸变敏感，但应变诱导的双共线→二聚体反铁磁相变长期以来难以实验实现和确定性控制，原因在于强烈的磁阻挫效应。
AI.method: 结合高分辨扫描隧道显微镜（STM）与密度泛函理论（DFT）计算，在FeTe薄膜和FeTe/FeSe异质结中，利用位错区域附近的局域单轴应变工程，系统映射应变场与磁基态的对应关系。
AI.result: 1）沿Fe-Fe次近邻方向施加单轴压缩可稳定双共线反铁磁序；2）沿Fe-Fe近邻方向的各向异性应变首次实现了长程二聚体反铁磁序，伴随√2×√2电子重构；3）两种磁序具有相同的奈尔温度。
AI.conclusion: 各向异性应变可有效解除竞争磁态间的简并，为操控铁基超导体中难以捉摸的磁序提供了鲁棒策略，并为理解晶格、自旋与电子自由度之间的耦合提供了新见解。

title: Multiband Superconductivity and Charge Density Wave in HfxZr1-xTe3 single crystals
summary: We report on the bulk multiband superconductivity and charge density wave (CDW) in HfxZr1-xTe3 single crystals. The parent compound ZrTe3 is a layered van der Waals material that undergoes a CDW transition near 63 K and exhibits only filamentary superconductivity below 2.0 K. Upon the introduction of a small amount of Hf (x = 0.02), the CDW transition temperature is reduced to TCDW ~ 53 K, while a robust bulk superconducting state emerges at Tc ~ 3.3 K, underscoring a subtle competition between CDW order and superconductivity in this quasi-one-dimensional system. Electrical resistivity, magnetic susceptibility, Hall effect, Seebeck coefficient, and specific heat measurements consistently confirm the bulk nature of the superconducting phase. The temperature dependence of the upper critical field Hc2(T) deviates markedly from single-band behavior, and it is well described by a two-band model, consistent with multiband superconductivity. Analysis of the Hall effect, and thermoelectric behavior reveal pronounced electronic anisotropy, with enhanced effective carrier masses, indicating that the subtle structural modification introduced by Hf substitutions affects the Fermi surface topology, as well as electronic correlations. Measurements of electrical resistivity in hydrostatic pressures up to ~ 2 GPa reveal that pressure drives TCDW to higher temperatures while suppressing Tc. These findings show that Hf doping can be used to fine-tune the balance between the CDW instability and superconductivity, possibly by means of chemical pressure effects, stabilizing a multiband superconducting state in Hf-doped ZrTe3.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了在HfxZr1-xTe3单晶中，通过少量Hf掺杂（x=0.02）将CDW转变温度从63 K降至~53 K，同时诱导出体相超导电性（Tc ~ 3.3 K），并证实其为多带超导，揭示了CDW与超导电性之间的微妙竞争关系。
AI.motivation: 研究Hf掺杂对ZrTe3中CDW序和超导电性之间竞争关系的调控机制，探索通过化学压力稳定多带超导态的可能性。
AI.method: 通过Hf掺杂合成HfxZr1-xTe3单晶，采用电阻率、磁化率、霍尔效应、塞贝克系数、比热等测量表征超导性质，并用两带模型分析上临界场Hc2(T)，同时进行静水压实验（~2 GPa）。
AI.result: 少量Hf掺杂（x=0.02）使CDW温度从63 K降至53 K，同时出现体相超导（Tc ~ 3.3 K）；Hc2(T)偏离单带行为，符合两带模型；霍尔和热电测量显示增强的各向异性和有效质量；压力升高TCDW而抑制Tc。
AI.conclusion: Hf掺杂通过化学压力效应精细调节CDW与超导电性之间的平衡，稳定了多带超导态，为调控准一维体系中的竞争电子有序态提供了新途径。

title: Molecular reference corrections for quantum Monte Carlo adsorption energies
comment: 34 pages, 2 figures, 3 main tables; Supplemental Material included
summary: Accurate surface thermochemistry requires balanced error cancellation between extended slabs and molecular reference states. This balance can fail whenever the electronic-structure error is not transferable across the chemically distinct species entering a thermodynamic cycle. Here we examine this problem in single-determinant fixed-node diffusion Monte Carlo (SD-FNDMC) for oxygenated ORR intermediates on Pt(111). Gas-phase thermochemistry is used to diagnose the reference-state imbalance, and a hybrid cycle is introduced to separate slab-adsorbate binding from molecular formation. The hybrid cycle keeps the surface binding term at the SD-FNDMC level, where cancellation is expected to be most favorable, and replaces the molecular formation contribution with a benchmark coupled cluster reference. For Pt(111), the resulting correction is small for O and OH but larger for OOH, while the geometry-matched refinement gives only a secondary correction. Applying the same cycle to HCO and COH on Cu(111) gives corrections of opposite sign, showing that the bias is controlled primarily by the electronic structure of the molecular reference rather than by adsorbate geometry alone. This decomposition identifies molecular reference imbalance as a separable source of error in SD-FNDMC surface thermochemistry and reduces the corresponding bias without modifying the SD-FNDMC slab-binding contribution.

AI.tldr: 本文研究单行列式固定节点扩散蒙特卡洛（SD-FNDMC）方法在表面热化学计算中因分子参考态误差不平衡导致的问题，提出混合循环方法将表面吸附结合能保持SD-FNDMC水平，分子形成贡献替换为耦合簇参考，从而分离并修正分子参考态误差。
AI.motivation: SD-FNDMC方法在表面热化学中因电子结构误差在扩展板层与分子参考态之间不可传递，导致误差抵消失衡，影响氧还原反应中间体在Pt(111)表面热化学计算的准确性。
AI.method: 提出混合循环：表面吸附项保留SD-FNDMC水平（误差抵消有利），分子形成贡献替换为高精度耦合簇参考基准，并通过气相热化学诊断参考态不平衡。
AI.result: Pt(111)上O和OH的校正较小，OOH校正较大；几何匹配仅产生次要修正。在Cu(111)上HCO和COH的校正符号相反，表明偏差主要由分子参考态电子结构控制，而非吸附质几何结构。
AI.conclusion: 分子参考态不平衡是SD-FNDMC表面热化学中可分离的误差来源，所提混合循环能有效降低该偏差，且无需修改SD-FNDMC板层吸附贡献。

title: Reaching the thermodynamic limit of periodic CCSD cohesive energies and band gaps with denser Brillouin zone sampling
summary: The high computational cost of periodic coupled-cluster theory has limited the density of Brillouin zone sampling, yielding finite-size errors that need to be removed by extrapolation. Here we report the development and application of a distributed-memory software implementation of periodic coupled-cluster theory with single and double excitations (CCSD) that runs efficiently on up to 12 nodes with 96 cores each. This new implementation allows ground-state and excited-state calculations in which the Brillouin zone is sampled with up to $6^3=216$ $k$-points, allowing us to reliably extrapolate to the thermodynamic limit. For eight simple semiconductors and insulators, we report the cohesive energy and band gap, which are converged to 0.1 eV, providing definitive benchmark numbers for the CCSD level of theory. Compared to experimental values, average errors for the cohesive energy are 0.1-0.2 eV (typically an underestimate), and average errors for the band gap are about 0.4 eV (typically an overestimate).

AI.tldr: 本文开发了分布式内存的周期耦合簇理论（CCSD）软件实现，支持多达216个k点采样，显著降低了有限尺寸误差，为8种半导体和绝缘体提供了收敛到0.1 eV的基准结果。
AI.motivation: 周期耦合簇理论计算成本极高，导致布里渊区采样点密度不足，产生有限尺寸误差，需要通过外推消除，限制了计算精度。
AI.method: 开发了分布式内存并行CCSD软件，可在12节点（每节点96核）上高效运行，支持多达6³=216个k点采样，实现热力学极限外推。
AI.result: 对8种简单半导体和绝缘体，内聚能和带隙收敛至0.1 eV，提供CCSD基准值；内聚能平均误差0.1-0.2 eV（低估），带隙平均误差约0.4 eV（高估）。
AI.conclusion: 新的大规模并行CCSD实现有效降低了有限尺寸误差，为凝聚态体系的准确电子结构计算提供了可靠的基准方法。

title: When proofreading improves both speed and accuracy
summary: Proofreading is generally thought to improve accuracy at the expense of speed. We show that this trade-off can be reversed in stochastic processes with long-lived stalled states. Using a non-Markovian renewal framework, we derive exact expressions for the error rate and completion time under proofreading for arbitrary stall-time distributions. Our analysis reveals that fluctuations in stall durations, rather than their mean alone, determine whether proofreading can simultaneously increase speed and accuracy. In the limit of strong stalling, this regime emerges when the coefficient of variation of the stall time exceeds a threshold set by the intrinsic error rate. These results provide a general criterion for proofreading in systems ranging from self-assembly and polymer replication to immune recognition and other nonequilibrium information-processing systems.

AI.tldr: 本文通过非马尔可夫更新框架，证明在具有长寿命停滞状态的随机过程中，校对可以同时提高速度和准确性，打破了传统认知中校对以速度换取精度的权衡关系。
AI.motivation: 挑战传统观点中"校对必然牺牲速度以换取准确性"的认知，探索在停滞状态存在时这一权衡是否可以被逆转。
AI.method: 使用非马尔可夫更新框架（non-Markovian renewal framework），推导了在任意停滞时间分布下校对过程的错误率和完成时间的精确表达式。
AI.result: 发现停滞持续时间的波动（而非仅其均值）决定了校对能否同时提高速度和准确性。在强停滞极限下，当停滞时间的变异系数超过由本征错误率设定的阈值时，校对可以同时提升速度和精度。
AI.conclusion: 为自组装、聚合物复制、免疫识别等系统中的校对提供了通用的判别准则。

title: Role of quantum confinement in semiconductor-superconductor core-shell nanowires
summary: This work is motivated by the experimentally observed coherence of the supercurrent in semiconductor nanowires covered by a half-shell metallic superconductor, which leads to flux dependent supercurrent oscillations with period h/2e, as expected for a tubular superconductor, i.e. Little-Parks oscillations. We perform microscopic model calculations and compare the results for full and half metallic shells. We use an effective Hamiltonian derived from the Green's function of the proximitized semiconductor nanowire, where the presence of the superconductor is represented by a self energy. Furthermore, we incorporate the electrostatic band-bending at the metal-semiconductor interface as a rectangular narrow quantum well on the semiconductor side. The properties of the eigenstates of the effective Hamiltonian are determined by the spatial profile of the corresponding transverse modes in the normal state. For half-shell wires, transverse modes with high-enough energy expand outside the interface quantum well and generate eigenstates with mixed electron-hole character that surround the entire circumference of the nanowire, similar to eigenstates of the full-shell system. We identify these states as being responsible for the observed Little-Parks effect.

AI.tldr: 本文通过微观模型计算，研究了半壳超导金属覆盖的半导体纳米线中实验观测到的超流相干性，发现其产生与Little-Parks振荡相关的h/2e周期超流振荡。研究表明，半壳纳米线中高能横向模可扩展至界面量子阱外，形成环绕纳米线全周长的电子-空穴混合态，这些态是Little-Parks效应的根源。
AI.motivation: 实验观察到半导体纳米线被半壳超导金属覆盖时，超流具有相干性并呈现h/2e周期的Little-Parks振荡，这需要理论解释。
AI.method: 进行全壳与半壳金属覆盖的微观模型对比计算；利用近邻化半导体纳米线格林函数推导有效哈密顿量，超导体贡献以自能表示；在金属-半导体界面引入矩形窄量子阱模拟静电能带弯曲；通过分析正常态横向模空间轮廓确定有效哈密顿量本征态性质。
AI.result: 半壳纳米线中，能量足够高的横向模可扩展至界面量子阱之外，形成环绕纳米线全周长的混合电子-空穴本征态，类似于全壳系统；这些态是Little-Parks效应的根源。
AI.conclusion: 半壳超导覆盖纳米线中高能横模产生的全周长环绕电子-空穴混合态是Little-Parks振荡的微观机制，解释了实验观测到的h/2e周期超流振荡。

title: Computationally efficient method for determining limiting velocities of edge dislocations in anisotropic crystals
summary: The continuum-limit theory of dislocations in crystals predicts divergences in the elastic energy at crystal-geometry dependent limiting velocities $v_L$, which separate subsonic, transsonic, and supersonic dislocation glide regimes and are therefore import for material strength models at high strain rates. Although it is known how to calculate those limiting velocities, there is one special case - edge dislocations with reflection symmetry, but non-vanishing elastic constants $c'_{16}$ or $c'_{26}$ - where previous methods have been notoriously slow. In this letter, we address this deficiency by deriving a computationally efficient method for determining the limiting velocities of edge dislocations with reflection symmetry.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种计算边缘位错极限速度的高效方法，解决了以往方法在特定对称性条件下计算缓慢的问题。
AI.motivation: 晶体中位错的连续极限理论预测弹性能在特定极限速度处发散，这些速度对高应变率下的材料强度模型至关重要。但现有方法在计算具有反射对称性但非零弹性常数的边缘位错极限速度时效率极低。
AI.method: 本文推导了一种计算效率高的数值方法，专门用于确定具有反射对称性的边缘位错的极限速度。
AI.result: 新方法显著提高了计算速度，弥补了以往方法在该特殊情况下的性能缺陷。
AI.conclusion: 本文提供的高效计算方法使得在具有反射对称性但含非零c'16或c'26弹性常数的晶体中，也能快速准确地确定边缘位错的极限速度。

title: Phase diagram of the Kitaev-Heisenberg-$Γ$ model: Classical and quantum magnetism, frustration, and subdominant interactions
summary: The Kitaev spin liquid provides a rare example of exactly solvable quantum spin liquid states. Intensive research over the past two decades has identified a variety of its candidate materials. In real materials, however, the Kitaev interaction is inevitably accompanied by additional magnetic interactions such as the Heisenberg and $Γ$ interactions. These interactions often induce magnetic ordering at low temperatures, making it essential to clarify their effects in the search for and design of Kitaev spin liquid candidate materials. In this study, we revisit the ground-state phase diagram of the Kitaev-Heisenberg-$Γ$ model from both classical and quantum perspectives, using state-of-the-art numerical techniques. In the classical case, we reveal a $zoo$ $of$ $noncollinear$ $orders$, where a variety of noncollinear multiple-$Q$ magnetic orders with and without incommensurate modulations emerge. In the quantum case, we unravel that quantum fluctuations suppress many of the competing orders found in the classical case, resulting in a reduced number of dominant incommensurate orders. We further identify $highly$ $frustrated$ regions, where spiral spin liquid states as well as new magnetically ordered states are potentially stabilized by other additional magnetic interactions. Our results provide a comprehensive perspective on the Kitaev-Heisenberg-$Γ$ model for both classical and quantum spins and offer a valuable guide not only for interpreting experimental results on candidate materials, but also for searching and designing new materials to realize the Kitaev spin liquid.

AI.tldr: 本文通过经典和量子数值方法重新研究了Kitaev-Heisenberg-Γ模型的基态相图，发现经典情况下存在丰富的非共线多Q磁序，量子涨落则抑制了许多竞争序，并识别出高度阻挫区域，为寻找和设计Kitaev自旋液体候选材料提供了指导。
AI.motivation: Kitaev自旋液体是精确可解的量子自旋液体态，但实际候选材料中Kitaev相互作用不可避免伴随Heisenberg和Γ等其他磁相互作用，这些相互作用会在低温下诱导磁有序。因此，澄清这些相互作用的影响对于寻找和设计Kitaev自旋液体候选材料至关重要。
AI.method: 采用最先进的数值技术，从经典和量子两个角度重新研究Kitaev-Heisenberg-Γ模型的基态相图。
AI.result: 经典情形下揭示了多种非共线多Q磁序（包括有/无不相称调制的磁序）；量子情形下，量子涨落抑制了许多经典竞争序，使不相称序占主导；识别出高度阻挫区域，其中螺旋自旋液体态和新磁有序态可能被其他磁相互作用稳定。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为Kitaev-Heisenberg-Γ模型提供了经典和量子自旋的全面视角，不仅有助于解释候选材料的实验结果，也为寻找和设计新型Kitaev自旋液体材料提供了有价值的指导。

title: Revealing nonvolatile behaviors in magneto-thermal switching using microstructure-controlled superconducting composites
summary: Thermal conductivity in a conductor changes by the application of an external magnetic field, which functions as a magneto-thermal switch. For superconductors, a large magneto-thermal switching can occur through a superconducting-to-normal conducting phase transition due to the change in the electron contribution in thermal conductivity. Arima et al. recently reported a nonvolatile nature of the magneto-thermal switching for superconducting solders, which consist of phase-separated Sn and Pb domains. Although they clarified that magnetic flux trapping is required to induce the nonvolatile magneto-thermal switching, a rule for such material design is still unclear. Here, we investigate the microstructure dependence of magneto-thermal switching in superconducting Sn/Pb multilayered composites, which are created by an accumulative roll bonding method. The thickness of each layer, that is the scale of microstructure, can be systematically controlled by the repetition number of roll bonding while the whole sample size and average composition are unchanged. We find that, as the formation of micro-scaled Sn domains proceeds by increasing the repetition number, a nonvolatility in the magneto-thermal conductivity gradually appears in correlation with the remanent magnetization. This study directly confirms that the inclusions with a size comparable to or less than the magnetic vortex in superconducting matrix is essential for magnetic flux trapping, enabling the nonvolatile magneto-thermal switching in superconducting composites.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了超导Sn/Pb多层复合材料中微观结构对磁热开关非易失性的影响，发现微米级Sn夹杂物尺寸达到或小于磁涡旋尺寸时，可通过磁通捕获实现非易失性磁热开关。
AI.motivation: Arima等人发现超导焊料中磁热开关具有非易失性，但微观结构设计规则尚不明确，需探索微观结构对非易失性磁热开关的影响规律。
AI.method: 采用累积轧制法制备Sn/Pb多层复合材料，通过改变轧制次数系统调控各层厚度（即微观结构尺度），保持整体尺寸和平均成分不变，测量磁热导率和剩磁。
AI.result: 随着轧制次数增加，微米级Sn畴形成，磁热导率的非易失性逐渐出现，并与剩磁呈相关性。
AI.conclusion: 超导基体中尺寸小于或等于磁涡旋尺寸的夹杂物是实现磁通捕获并产生非易失性磁热开关的关键条件。

title: The effect of in-phase current and temperature oscillations on the impedance of the cathode catalyst layer in a PEM fuel cell
summary: An impedance model for the cathode catalyst layer (CCL) in a PEM fuel cell demonstrates that in-phase harmonic perturbations to the cell current density and CCL temperature lower both CCL impedance and static resistivity. This mitigation is primarily driven by the oscillating exchange current density of the oxygen reduction reaction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于PEM燃料电池阴极催化剂层的阻抗模型，发现电流密度和温度的谐波扰动可降低CCL阻抗和静态电阻率，主要归因于氧还原反应的交换电流密度振荡。
AI.motivation: 研究如何通过谐波扰动降低PEM燃料电池阴极催化剂层的阻抗和电阻率，以提升电池性能。
AI.method: 建立了CCL阻抗模型，通过在电流密度和温度上施加同相谐波扰动，分析其对阻抗和电阻率的影响。
AI.result: 同相谐波扰动显著降低了CCL的阻抗和静态电阻率。
AI.conclusion: 这种阻抗降低主要由氧还原反应的交换电流密度振荡驱动。

title: Population dynamics of surface-mediated autocatalytic processes
summary: We investigate the population dynamics of surface-mediated autocatalytic processes, in which particles diffuse in a complex environment towards surface regions where they can be either killed or replicated. These opposite mechanisms compete with each other and lead to a sophisticated stochastic evolution of the population size. We provide a systematic analysis of the generating function of the population size. We also deduce its distribution, mean, variance and higher-order moments. For this purpose, we employ several equivalent descriptions of these quantities in terms of nonlinear integral equations and partial differential equations with nonlinear boundary conditions. We inspect the long-time behavior of the population dynamics in three regimes when the mean population size vanishes, reaches a steady-state level, or grows exponentially. A numerical solution of the underlying integral equations and independent Monte Carlo simulations support our theoretical predictions.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了表面介导的自催化过程种群动态，包括粒子扩散、表面死亡或复制机制，通过生成函数、矩分析、非线性积分方程和偏微分方程等方法，揭示了种群在三种长期行为（消亡、稳态、指数增长）下的演化规律，并通过数值模拟验证了理论预测。
AI.motivation: 理解复杂环境中表面介导的自催化过程的种群动态演化规律，特别是死亡与复制两种相反机制竞争下的随机演化行为。
AI.method: 采用生成函数系统分析种群大小；推导分布、均值、方差和高阶矩；利用非线性积分方程和带非线性边界条件的偏微分方程进行等价描述；通过数值解和蒙特卡洛模拟验证理论。
AI.result: 识别出三种长期行为 regimes：平均种群大小消失、达到稳态水平、或呈指数增长；数值解和蒙特卡洛模拟支持理论预测。
AI.conclusion: 表面介导的自催化过程种群动态由死亡与复制竞争决定，存在三种不同的长期演化模式，理论框架与数值模拟一致。

title: Nonmonotonic temperature dependence of the thermopower of atomic-size gold contacts
summary: We report measurements of the thermopower of atomic-size gold contacts realized by the mechanically controllable break junction (MCBJ) technique over a temperature range from 18 K to 295 K. A thermometer included in the lithographic structure close to the constriction provides a direct measurement of the temperature increase generated by heating one side of the contact with a focused laser beam. While the conductance histograms confirm the quantum nature of the transport, we observe a nonmonotonic temperature dependence of the ensemble-averaged thermopower with a minimum of $-2\,μ$VK$^{-1}$ at about 150 K. The values for the thermopower obtained at the lowest and the high temperature are compatible with values reported in the literature, but the nonmonotonic behavior in between disagrees with the expected linear dependence for quantum coherent conductors described by the Landauer formula. We develop a theoretical model based on an energy dependent transmission function that qualitatively reproduces the nonmonotonic behavior, but fails quantitatively. We therefore interpret our data as a result of phonon contributions to the thermopower beyond the Landauer model and with opposite sign than the classical phonon drag known from bulk systems. Our findings show that, firstly, the thermopower gives important insight into the transport properties of atomic-size structures and second that the linear approximation of the Landauer model has to be used with caution when studying more complex transport properties even for atomic contacts from free-electron metals.

AI.tldr: 本文通过机械可控断裂结技术测量了原子尺寸金接触的热电势在18 K至295 K范围内的温度依赖性，发现其呈现非单调变化（约150 K时最小值为-2 μVK⁻¹），与Landauer模型预期的线性行为不符，并归因于声子贡献（与经典声子拖曳效应符号相反），表明Landauer模型的线性近似在复杂输运研究中需谨慎使用。
AI.motivation: 探究原子尺寸金接触的热电势随温度的变化规律，验证Landauer模型在量子相干导体中的适用性，并揭示声子效应对热电势的额外贡献。
AI.method: 采用机械可控断裂结技术制备原子尺寸金接触，结合光刻集成温度计测量激光加热引起的温升，在18 K至295 K范围内测量热电势，并构建基于能量依赖透射函数的理论模型进行对比分析。
AI.result: 热电势随温度呈非单调变化，约150 K时达到最小值-2 μVK⁻¹；低温与高温下的热电势值与文献一致，但中间温度范围偏离Landauer模型的线性预期；理论模型仅能定性重现非单调行为。
AI.conclusion: 热电势研究为原子尺寸结构输运性质提供了重要认识；Landauer模型的线性近似在复杂输运研究中需谨慎使用；观察到的非单调行为源于与经典声子拖曳符号相反的声子贡献。

title: Resolving Finite-Size Errors in EOM-CCSD Band Gaps of Solids with Interacting-Bath Dynamical Embedding Theory
summary: Periodic equation-of-motion coupled-cluster theory with single and double excitations (EOM-CCSD) has shown promise for quantitative calculations of band structures in solids. However, its steep computational scaling has limited calculations to relatively coarse $k$-point meshes, leading to sizable finite-size errors and discrepant estimates of thermodynamic-limit band gaps in recent benchmarks. In this work, we revisit EOM-CCSD band gaps for ten semiconductors and insulators using interacting-bath dynamical embedding theory (ibDET), a systematically improvable Green's function embedding framework that enables dense Brillouin-zone sampling at modest computational cost. By pushing the $k$-point sampling up to $10\times10\times10$, well beyond the system sizes accessible in canonical periodic EOM-CCSD calculations, we significantly reduce finite-size errors and obtain stable thermodynamic-limit extrapolations. We further compare $G_0W_0$@PBE, $G_0W_0$@HF, and EOM-CCSD on an equal footing using the same numerical settings in PySCF. We find that EOM-CCSD yields a mean absolute error of 0.27 eV relative to experimental band gaps for a test set of ten semiconductors and insulators, lower than that of $G_0W_0$@PBE. For ZnO, EOM-CCSD also accurately describes the Zn $3d$-band binding energy, despite overestimating the band gap. These results demonstrate that ibDET offers a practical route to high-accuracy many-body electronic structure calculations in periodic systems.

AI.tldr: 本文利用相互作用浴动态嵌入理论（ibDET）将周期EOM-CCSD方法扩展到更密的k点采样（最高10×10×10），显著减小了十种半导体和绝缘体带隙计算中的有限尺寸误差，获得了比G₀W₀@PBE更低的平均绝对误差（0.27 eV），展示了ibDET作为周期性体系高精度电子结构计算实用途径的潜力。
AI.motivation: 周期EOM-CCSD方法在固体能带结构定量计算中表现出潜力，但其高计算复杂度使其只能使用较粗的k点网格，导致显著的有限尺寸误差和热力学极限带隙的评估不一致。作者希望解决这一问题，实现更密集的布里渊区采样以获得更准确的带隙计算结果。
AI.method: 采用相互作用浴动态嵌入理论（ibDET），这是一种可系统改进的格林函数嵌入框架，能够以适中的计算成本实现密集的布里渊区采样。将k点采样推至10×10×10网格，远超周期EOM-CCSD直接计算的能力范围，然后进行热力学极限外推。同时在PySCF中使用相同数值设置，将G₀W₀@PBE、G₀W₀@HF和EOM-CCSD进行公平比较。
AI.result: EOM-CCSD在十种半导体和绝缘体的测试集上，相对于实验带隙的平均绝对误差为0.27 eV，低于G₀W₀@PBE的结果。对于ZnO，EOM-CCSD能准确描述Zn 3d带结合能，尽管带隙有所高估。
AI.conclusion: ibDET为周期性体系的高精度多体电子结构计算提供了一条实用途径，能够在保持准确性的同时大幅降低计算成本，实现更密集的k点采样和更可靠的能带间隙预测。

title: Frustration effects on the magnetization plateau physics in a trimerized quantum spin-1/2 chain
summary: We investigate frustration-induced instabilities in a trimerized quantum spin chain motivated by recent experimental findings for the compound Na$_2$Cu$_3$Ge$_4$O$_{12}$. Employing a cluster mean-field approach combined with Lanczos exact diagonalization, we analyze the ground-state and quantum-information properties of a Heisenberg model with competing interactions in a magnetic field. In the weakly frustrated regime, the system exhibits a robust $1/3$ magnetization plateau associated with a collective ferrimagnetic-like trimer state. Increasing the next-nearest-neighbor intratrimer coupling drives a pronounced reorganization of spin correlations, leading to a crossover toward a doublon-like correlation regime and providing a static ground-state picture consistent with the composite excitations observed dynamically in trimerized chains. The resulting low-energy behavior can be interpreted in terms of weakly interacting emergent spins, offering a microscopic explanation for the extended stability of the magnetization plateau. Furthermore, through finite-size scaling analyses of the energy gap, von Neumann entanglement entropy, and fidelity susceptibility, we characterize the zero-field criticality of the model. Ultimately, our results suggest that frustration gives rise to qualitatively distinct quantum states and provide a microscopic framework for understanding the emergence of fractionalized excitations in trimerized quantum spin systems.

AI.tldr: 本文基于Na₂Cu₃Ge₄O₁₂化合物，通过团簇平均场结合Lanczos精确对角化方法，研究了三聚化量子自旋链中挫败诱导的不稳定性。发现弱挫败区存在与铁磁-like三聚体态相关的1/3磁化平台，而增大链内次近邻耦合导致自旋关联重组，出现doublon-like关联区，为零场临界性提供了微观解释。
AI.motivation: 受Na₂Cu₃Ge₄O₁₂化合物的实验发现启发，探索三聚化量子自旋链中挫败效应对磁化平台稳定性、自旋关联重组以及分数化激发的微观机制。
AI.method: 采用团簇平均场方法结合Lanczos精确对角化，分析含竞争相互作用的Heisenberg模型在磁场中的基态和量子信息性质，并通过有限尺寸标度分析能隙、von Neumann纠缠熵和保真度敏感度。
AI.result: 弱挫败区系统展现与铁磁-like三聚体态相关的1/3磁化平台；增强链内次近邻耦合导致从铁磁-like关联到doublon-like关联的交叉；通过有限尺寸标度表征了零场临界性。
AI.conclusion: 挫败能产生性质不同的量子态，为理解三聚化量子自旋系统中分数化激发的出现提供了微观框架。

title: Andreev Reflection to Probe Momentum-Dependent Spin Polarization in Altermagnet CrSb
summary: Altermagnetic materials have recently emerged as promising candidates for next-generation spintronic applications, characterized by the k-dependent spin-splitted band structure and a simultaneous zero-net-magnetization. Among them, altermagnetic candidate CrSb has attracted considerable attention, owing to its g-wave spin splitting and high Néel temperature. In this article, we employed mechanical point-contact spectroscopy (MPCS) with superconducting Nb tips to probe the Andreev reflection on CrSb single crystals along three principal crystallographic orientations. The extracted momentum-dependent spin polarizations are approximately 73.4% for the (0001) plane, 67.9% for the (-1-120) plane, and 61.9% for the (10-10) plane, respectively, distinct from conventional antiferromagnets. Furthermore, conductance spectra from spatial line-scans on the sample surface support the existence of altermagnetic domains with a characteristic size of 250-500 nm separated by domain-walls with width about 250 nm. These results strongly support the momentum-dependent spin polarization in altermagnetic CrSb and establish Andreev reflection as a new paradigm to probe k-dependent spin textures.

AI.tldr: 本文利用超导Nb针尖的机械点接触谱学(MPCS)技术，在CrSb单晶的三个主要晶向上探测Andreev反射，提取出约61.9%-73.4%的动量依赖自旋极化率，并观测到250-500 nm的交变磁畴及约250 nm的畴壁，证实了CrSb的交变磁性及其动量依赖的自旋极化特性。
AI.motivation: 交变磁材料（altermagnetic materials）因其k依赖的自旋分裂能带结构和零净磁化强度，成为下一代自旋电子学应用的候选材料。其中CrSb因其g波自旋分裂和高奈尔温度备受关注，但需要实验手段直接探测其动量依赖的自旋极化特性。
AI.method: 采用机械点接触谱学(MPCS)技术，使用超导Nb针尖在CrSb单晶的三个主晶面（(0001)、(-1-120)、(10-10)）上测量Andreev反射，并通过空间线扫描分析样品表面的导电谱。
AI.conclusion: 实验结果强有力支持了CrSb交变磁体中动量依赖的自旋极化，并建立了Andreev反射作为探测k依赖自旋织构的新范式。

title: Model structures and electron transfer properties of conductive nickel-organic nanoribbons in cable bacteria
comment: 42 pages, 5 main figures, 8 supporting figures, 5 supporting tables
summary: Cable bacteria are multicellular bacteria capable of centimeter-scale conduction through a regular fiber network embedded in their cell envelope. The conductivity of these fibers is extremely high for biological materials, and rivals that of the best synthetic conductive polymers, but the underlying electron transport mechanism remains elusive. Recent microscopic and spectroscopic evidence indicates that each fiber embeds a bundle of intertwined nanoribbons as the conductive conduit. Each nanoribbon consists of a one-dimensional nickel-organic framework, built from stacked nickel bis(1,2-dithiolene) oligomers (NiBiD units) as molecular building blocks. Here we performed DFT calculations of nanoribbon model structures, in order to characterize their electronic properties, examine potential stacking configurations and verify whether these structures can support efficient conductance. Our simulations indicate that nanoribbons are comprised of tightly stacked AA or AB-type packings of NiBiD units. In the most energetically stable structure (AB-type) some Ni centers are predicted to be 5-fold coordinated due to formation of an inter-layer Ni-S coordination bond. In several energetically low-lying structures, the electronic coupling between neighboring molecules exceeds the critical threshold for charge delocalization permitting efficient charge transport beyond small polaron hopping. Our results hence reveal that nanoribbons based on NiBiD units exhibit favorable charge transfer properties that may explain the unusually high conductivities measured in the fibers of cable bacteria.

AI.tldr: 本文通过DFT计算研究了电缆细菌纳米带的电子性质，发现NiBiD单元的AA或AB型堆叠结构具有强电子耦合，能够支持高效电荷传输，解释了其异常高的导电性。
AI.motivation: 电缆细菌的纤维具有极高的导电性（媲美合成导电聚合物），但其电子传输机制尚不明确，需要理论计算来揭示其微观导电原理。
AI.method: 采用密度泛函理论（DFT）计算，对基于NiBiD单元堆叠的纳米带模型进行电子结构表征、堆叠构型优化及电荷传输性质评估。
AI.result: 1）纳米带由AA或AB型紧密堆叠的NiBiD单元构成；2）最稳定的AB型结构中部分Ni中心因层间Ni-S配位键形成五配位；3）多种低能结构中分子间电子耦合超过电荷离域临界阈值。
AI.conclusion: NiBiD基纳米带具有优异的电荷转移特性，可解释电缆细菌纤维的超高导电性，支持非小极化子跳跃的高效电荷传输机制。

title: Quantum charge pumping in helical systems: A comparative study of short- and long-range hopping
summary: Using the Keldysh non-equilibrium Green's function approach, we investigate charge pumping through a single-stranded helical structure described by a tight-binding model that includes either short-range hopping (SRH) or long-range hopping (LRH). While quantum pumping has been studied in various low-dimensional systems, the detailed behavior of the spectral current and the pumped dc current in helical geometries in the presence of higher-order electron hopping (beyond nearest neighbors) has not yet been systematically explored. Here, we focus on the interplay between helicity and extended hopping ranges, analyzing how they jointly control the energy-resolved and dc pumped currents under time-periodic end potentials. For LRH, the pumped dc current exhibits pronounced plateau-like regions as a function of chemical potential when energy levels are sparsely spaced -- consistent with adiabatic transport -- whereas SRH yields more parameter-sensitive currents without clear plateaus. The plateau stability is controlled by the drive frequency: at higher frequencies, Floquet side-band mixing destroys the plateaus, leading to oscillatory currents. The phase dependence remains nearly sinusoidal, and the current vanishes at zero phase lag, confirming the necessity of out-of-phase potentials. Crucially, in helical systems, the decay exponent $(\ell_c)$ acts as an effective structural parameter that can tune both the magnitude and sign of the pumped current, offering a geometric knob for controlling quantum pumping. Our findings not only fill a gap in the understanding of spectral and pumped currents in helical systems with extended hopping but also provide tools that can be applied to analyze similar phenomena in other chiral or quasi-one-dimensional systems.

AI.tldr: 本文利用Keldysh非平衡格林函数方法，研究了具有短程跳跃（SRH）或长程跳跃（LRH）的单股螺旋结构中的电荷泵浦现象，发现长程跳跃下泵浦直流电流出现明显平台区，且螺旋结构的衰减指数可作为调控泵浦电流大小和符号的几何参数。
AI.motivation: 尽管量子泵浦在多种低维系统中已有研究，但螺旋几何结构中存在高阶电子跳跃（超出最近邻）时，谱电流和泵浦直流电流的详细行为尚未被系统探索。
AI.method: 采用Keldysh非平衡格林函数方法，对包含短程跳跃或长程跳跃的单股螺旋结构紧束缚模型进行理论分析，研究在时间周期性端势作用下，螺旋性和扩展跳跃范围如何共同影响能量分辨电流和直流泵浦电流。
AI.result: 长程跳跃下，当能级稀疏时泵浦直流电流呈现明显平台区（与绝热输运一致）；短程跳跃则产生参数敏感的无平台电流。平台稳定性受驱动频率控制，高频下Floquet边带混合破坏平台导致振荡电流。相位依赖性接近正弦，零相位差时电流消失。螺旋系统的衰减指数可作为调控泵浦电流大小和符号的结构参数。
AI.conclusion: 该研究填补了螺旋系统中扩展跳跃对谱电流和泵浦电流影响的理解空白，为手性或准一维系统中的类似现象分析提供了工具，并指出螺旋结构的几何参数可作为调控量子泵浦的有效手段。

title: Lock-In Infrared Thermography: Phase Analysis for Rapid, Wide-Range Thermal Conductivity Measurements
summary: We report on a phase-based lock-in thermography approach, combined with a multilayered thermal model (often employed in thermoreflectance analysis), to measure the thermal conductivity of bulk materials and layered structures. The spatial distribution of the material's thermal phase is monitored with an infrared camera, which is locked into the frequency of a modulated laser used to heat the material. This phase distribution is then fit with a thermal model, in which properties such as thermal conductivity are extracted as fit parameters. This approach enables non-contact, front-side measurements, which are insensitive to surface roughness. The technique does not strictly require the application of a transducer layer, but we highlight the practical benefits of applying a removable adhesive layer to serve as a near-surface absorber. We demonstrate the efficacy of the method by measuring materials with thermal conductivities that span over three orders of magnitude (approximately 1 W/m/K to > 2000 W/m/K).

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于锁相热成像与多层热模型相结合的非接触式热导率测量方法，可测量从~1 W/m/K到>2000 W/m/K的材料，对表面粗糙度不敏感，且无需严格使用转换层。
AI.motivation: 现有热导率测量方法（如时域热反射法）往往需要接触式测量或对表面粗糙度敏感，且通常需要沉积转换层。作者希望开发一种非接触、正面测量、对表面粗糙度不敏感且适用范围广的热导率测量技术。
AI.method: 采用锁相热成像技术，用调制激光加热材料，红外相机锁频监测材料热相位的空间分布；将相位分布与多层热模型（常用于热反射分析）拟合，提取热导率等参数；可选可移除粘附层作为近表面吸收体以提升效果。
AI.result: 成功测量了热导率跨越三个数量级（约1 W/m/K至>2000 W/m/K）的材料，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法是一种非接触、正面测量、对表面粗糙度不敏感的新型热导率测量技术，无需严格使用转换层，但可移除粘附层能提供实际便利，适用于块体材料和层状结构。

title: Modeling strained Cd$_3$As$_2$ thin films and their behavior in magnetic fields
summary: We present a systematic analysis of the behavior of thin films of Cd$_3$As$_2$ under different strain profiles and in magnetic fields. In each case, we construct effective $k \cdot p$ models by considering the reduction of symmetry and all constraints imposed by the remaining symmetries. Our analysis naturally describes both in-plane biaxial and uniaxial strain. Biaxial strain is expected to preserve in-plane $C_4$ rotational symmetry while breaking inversion, allowing for a description in terms of the $4mm$ point group. Uniaxial strain, on the other hand, breaks $C_4$ symmetry. For this case, we consider two scenarios: one preserving inversion, described by the $mmm$ group, and one breaking it, leading to $2mm$ symmetry. After deriving the models, we examine the effects of out-of-plane magnetic fields, identifying two possible microscopic mechanisms that can account for the experimental results reported in Ahadi et al. (2025). Importantly, our analysis proposes a new method for differentiating between them. By incorporating the effects of multiple subbands along the confinement direction, we show that the opening of a gap in the lowest Landau level requires either reducing the symmetry down to $2mm$, breaking both inversion and $C_4$ rotations, or a topological transition of the band structure due to strain-induced band renormalization. Furthermore, we demonstrate that a two-dimensional Dirac semimetal phase can be induced by sufficiently large in-plane magnetic fields. This phase is highly sensitive to different strain profiles, with band touchings occurring when the field is applied perpendicular to preserved mirror planes, serving as a powerful probe of the material's strain profile.

AI.tldr: 本文系统分析了Cd₃As₂薄膜在不同应变和磁场下的行为，构建了有效k·p模型，发现最低朗道能级打开能隙需要降低对称性至2mm或应变诱导能带拓扑转变，并证明二维狄拉克半金属相可由面内磁场诱导，且对应变高度敏感，可用于探测材料应变分布。
AI.motivation: 理解Cd₃As₂薄膜在不同应变分布和磁场下的电子行为，并解释Ahadi等人(2025)实验中的观测结果。
AI.method: 基于对称性约化构建有效k·p模型，分别考虑双轴应变（保留C₄对称性，破缺反演，4mm点群）和单轴应变（两种情形：保留反演mmm群、破缺反演2mm群），然后分析面外和面内磁场效应。
AI.result: 最低朗道能级打开能隙需要2mm对称性（同时破缺反演和C₄）或应变诱导能带拓扑重整。面内磁场可诱导二维狄拉克半金属相，该相对应变剖面高度敏感。
AI.conclusion: 提出了区分两种微观机制的新方法，并证明面内磁场诱导的狄拉克半金属相可作为应变分布的有效探针。

title: Current patterns and loss contributions in CORT cables carrying AC current
summary: Conductor-on-round-tube (CORT) cables are a potential solution for carrying AC power in a small cross-section. Due to the geometry of the cable and the helical arrangement of the coated conductors (CC), the current follows a non-trivial pattern inside each CC. For instance, for the case of a single-layer cable, the current flow is mostly axial along the outer face of the CCs and mostly azimuthal along their inner face. Such a current distribution, known as the Garber current pattern, affects the transport AC losses. In numerical models, commonly adopted simplifications are either based on straight conductors or infinitely thin CCs. Such approaches neglect the Garber current pattern and thus misrepresent both the detailed current flow within the CC and the resulting 3D distribution of the fields. In this work, the detailed 3D current distribution in the CCs is investigated in a one-layer CORT cable, as a function of the cable geometrical parameters such as the conductor thickness, the pitch angle, and the gap between adjacent CCs. In particular, the impact of the Garber current pattern is studied on the two largest contributions to the AC losses, namely the surface losses (associated with the penetration of the component of the magnetic field parallel to the wide faces of the superconducting layer) and the edge losses (associated with the penetration of the perpendicular component of the magnetic field occurring in the vicinity of the gaps between the CCs). The detailed distribution of the currents in the CCs is examined and its relationship with the different AC loss mechanisms is established. This study is carried out by means of an effective 2D model that uses a system of coordinates conforming with the helical structure of the cable.

AI.tldr: 本文通过一种有效的2D模型，研究了一层CORT电缆中Garber电流模式对AC损耗的影响，揭示了导体厚度、螺距角等几何参数与电流分布、损耗机制之间的关系。
AI.motivation: 现有数值模型常采用简化假设（如直导体或无限薄涂层导体），忽略了CORT电缆中实际存在的Garber电流模式，导致对电流分布和3D场分布的表征不准确，因此需要深入研究这种电流模式及其对AC损耗的影响。
AI.method: 采用一种与电缆螺旋结构共形的有效2D模型，系统研究单层CORT电缆中涂层导体的详细3D电流分布，分析导体厚度、螺距角和相邻导体间隙等几何参数的影响，重点关注Garber电流模式对表面损耗和边缘损耗的作用。
AI.result: 揭示了Garber电流模式与不同AC损耗机制之间的关系，明确了各几何参数对电流分布和损耗的定量影响。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为理解CORT电缆中AC损耗的来源提供了更精确的理论基础，所提出的共形2D模型可作为有效的分析工具，指导电缆几何参数的优化以降低损耗。

title: Excited-state Properties Beyond the Excitation Energy from Orbital-Optimized Density Functional Calculations II: Absorption Spectra
summary: Orbital-optimized density functional calculations describe each excited state using its own set of variationally optimized orbitals. While this state-specific optimization improves the description of excited states, it also results in nonorthogonal electronic states, which complicates the evaluation of transition properties. Existing benchmarks have primarily targeted the excitation energy, whereas estimates of oscillator strengths have largely been restricted to the first excited state only. In this study, Löwdin's formalism for nonorthogonal determinants is extended to the projector augmented-wave framework. It is then used with a plane-wave basis set to compute the oscillator strengths of several valence and Rydberg excited states in a set of molecules. Orbital-optimized density functional calculations qualitatively reproduce absorption spectra from high-level multireference reference methods across the molecular set, even when using a simple generalized-gradient approximation. The agreement in peak intensities is excellent for states dominated by a single determinant, whereas substantial discrepancies arise for states with strong multi-configurational character. Analysis of the exchange--correlation functional shows that the inclusion of exact exchange and explicit self-interaction correction does not provide a systematic improvement in the accuracy of oscillator strengths. Moreover, no clear correlation emerges between the errors in the absorption peaks and the nonzero overlap between the ground state and the orbital-optimized excited states.

AI.tldr: 本文将Löwdin的非正交行列式形式扩展到投影缀加波框架中，用平面波基组计算了多个分子的价层和里德堡激发态的振子强度，发现轨道优化的DFT能定性复现高精度多参考方法的吸收谱，但多组态特征强的态偏差较大，且引入精确交换和自相互作用修正并未系统改善振子强度精度。
AI.motivation: 现有轨道优化DFT计算主要聚焦于激发能，而振子强度（反映跃迁概率）的评估多局限于第一激发态，缺乏对更多激发态的系统基准测试。本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 将Löwdin的非正交行列式形式扩展到投影缀加波（PAW）框架，结合平面波基组，对多个分子的价层和里德堡激发态进行轨道优化DFT计算，得到振子强度，并与高精度多参考方法（如CASPT2）的结果进行比较。
AI.result: 轨道优化DFT（即使是简单的GGA泛函）能定性重现高精度方法的吸收谱。单行列式主导的态峰值强度吻合良好，而多组态特征强的态偏差显著。引入精确交换和自相互作用修正并未系统提升振子强度精度，且基态与激发态的非正交重叠与吸收峰误差之间无明确相关性。
AI.conclusion: 轨道优化DFT可用于定性预测吸收谱，但振子强度在多组态体系中仍存在局限，且简单地增加精确交换或自相互作用修正不能有效解决这一问题。

title: Thermoelectric information engine driven by an autonomous Maxwell demon across quantum-to-classical transitions
summary: We study a three-terminal thermoelectric engine, focusing on the role of quantum coherence and information flow. A double-dot connects two reservoirs at different chemical potentials, while a third dot monitors their occupation via Coulomb interaction and can be interpreted as an autonomous Maxwell demon. Within the parameter range where the device operates as an engine, we identify conditions under which this interpretation holds. The system dynamics is described within a Redfield master equation that allows us to identify two distinct dynamical regimes with steady states well captured by suitable Lindblad approximations. These two regimes define a first quantum-to-classical transition controlled by the interdot tunneling strength. We further consider the effect of a phonon bath coupled to the double-dot, which induces a second quantum-to-classical transition by generating incoherent transport and decoherence in the small interdot tunneling regime. We identify a parameter region where phonon-induced decoherence suppresses both the coherent transport contribution and the information flow toward the monitoring dot, suggesting that coherence can enhance the demon mechanism in this regime. By tracking information and transport properties across these crossovers, our model shows how coherent tunneling, decoherence, and incoherent phonon-assisted transport compete in an autonomous information engine, while clarifying which thermodynamic Lindblad description is appropriate in each regime.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了一种三端热电子引擎，重点分析了量子相干性和信息流的作用。双量子点连接两个不同化学势的储库，第三个量子点通过库仑相互作用监测其占据状态，可视为自主Maxwell妖。在引擎工作参数范围内，识别了该解释成立的条件。通过Redfield主方程描述系统动力学，发现两种不同动力学区域，其稳态可由合适的Lindblad近似捕捉。这两个区域由量子点间隧穿强度控制，定义了一次量子-经典转变。进一步考虑声子浴耦合，在弱隧穿区域引发第二次量子-经典转变。发现声子诱导退相干可抑制相干输运和信息流，而相干性可增强Demon机制。模型展示了相干隧穿、退相干和非相干声子辅助输运在自主信息引擎中的竞争。
AI.motivation: 探究量子相干性和信息流在三端热电子引擎中的作用，厘清自主Maxwell妖解释的适用条件，以及不同动力学区域下合适的Lindblad热力学描述。
AI.method: 采用Redfield主方程描述系统动力学，结合Lindblad近似分析稳态行为。通过调控量子点间隧穿强度和声子浴耦合，研究量子-经典转变及相干性、退相干与信息流的关系。
AI.result: 识别出由隧穿强度控制的第一次量子-经典转变，以及由声子浴引发的第二次量子-经典转变。发现声子诱导退相干在弱隧穿区域可同时抑制相干输运和信息流，表明相干性可增强Demon机制。
AI.conclusion: 模型揭示了相干隧穿、退相干和非相干声子辅助输运在自主信息引擎中的竞争关系，明确了各动力学区域适用的Lindblad热力学描述。

title: A micromagnetic model with bidirectional magneto-thermal coupling
summary: Most conventional micromagnetic frameworks in spin caloritronics rely on a unidirectional coupling approximation, wherein thermal fluctuations drive magnetization dynamics while the feedback of magnetic dissipation onto the thermal reservoir is neglected. Here, we establish a rigorously self-consistent bidirectional magneto-thermal coupling model by integrating the stochastic Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert (sLLG) equation with a generalized heat transfer equation. In this closed-loop framework, the local temperature acts as a dynamical variable, and the damping-induced dissipation alongside stochastic work dynamically feeds back into the thermal bath as localized heat sources. Utilizing Ito stochastic calculus, we analytically prove that this coupled system strictly obeys the first law of thermodynamics and spontaneously recovers the correct Boltzmann statistics at equilibrium. Spatially resolved micromagnetic simulations further validate the energy exchange mechanism, capturing the finite-bath temperature reduction induced by spatial variation of magnetic moments and the modified density of states under exchange interactions. This bidirectional framework provides a robust microscopic foundation for investigating complex nonequilibrium magneto-thermal dynamics, such as the unidirectional spin-wave heat conveyer effect, paving the way for advanced spin-caloritronic applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种双向磁-热耦合模型，将随机LLG方程与广义热传导方程结合，证明了其满足热力学第一定律并恢复玻尔兹曼统计，为自旋热电子学中的非平衡动力学提供了微观基础。
AI.motivation: 传统自旋热电子学框架采用单向耦合近似，忽略了磁耗散对热库的反馈，缺乏热力学自洽性。本文旨在建立严格自洽的双向磁-热耦合模型。
AI.method: 将随机Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert方程与广义热传导方程集成，利用Ito随机微积分证明热力学自洽性，并进行空间分辨的微磁模拟验证。
AI.result: 该双向耦合系统严格遵守热力学第一定律，在平衡态自发恢复正确的玻尔兹曼统计；模拟捕获了磁矩空间变化导致的有限热库温度降低以及交换作用下的态密度修正。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为研究非平衡磁-热动力学（如单向自旋波热输运效应）提供了稳健的微观基础，推动了自旋热电子学的发展。

title: Site Preferences and "Coloring Problem" in Cu-doped BiMn$_7$O$_{12}$ Quadruple Perovskite
summary: Lightly Cu-doped BiMn$_7$O$_{12}$ (x = 0.05, 0.10, and 0.15) was investigated using high-pressure synthesis, single-crystal X-ray diffraction, pair distribution function (PDF) analysis, STEM, magnetic measurements, and first-principles calculations. All compositions retain an average monoclinic $I$2/$m$ structure, while Cu substitution progressively suppresses the monoclinic distortion and drives the lattice toward a pseudo-cubic metric symmetry. PDF analysis reveals increasing local structural disorder and reduced medium-range coherence with increasing Cu concentration, despite preservation of the overall quadruple-perovskite framework. Single-crystal refinements indicate enhanced electron density at the octahedral Mn B sites, suggesting preferential Cu occupation within the MnO$_6$ network rather than the conventional square-planar sites expected for Cu$^{2+}$. Magnetic measurements reveal two characteristic anomalies near $T_1$ ~ 100-120 K and $T_2$ ~ 50-60 K, together with pronounced magnetic irreversibility, field-dependent hysteresis, and unsaturated magnetization. Increasing Cu concentration progressively suppresses the low-temperature magnetic state and weakens the field-induced moment. First-principles calculations favor Cu occupation at the square-planar sites, contrasting with the experimental refinements and highlighting strong competitions among local bonding, short-range disorder, and metastability in this highly frustrated quadruple perovskite system.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了轻度Cu掺杂的BiMn₇O₁₂体系，发现Cu优先占据八面体Mn位而非预期的方形平面位，随着掺杂浓度增加，单斜畸变被抑制、局部无序增强、低温磁态被压制，但第一性原理计算表明Cu更倾向占据方形平面位，揭示了该体系中的强竞争机制。
