AI.motivation: 探索Cu掺杂对BiMn₇O₁₂四重钙钛矿体系的结构、局部有序性和磁性的影响，特别是Cu的占位偏好及其引发的竞争机制。
AI.method: 采用高压合成、单晶X射线衍射、对分布函数(PDF)分析、STEM、磁测量和第一性原理计算等多种手段。
AI.result: Cu掺杂抑制单斜畸变使晶格趋向伪立方对称；PDF显示局部无序增加、中程有序降低；实验表明Cu优先占据八面体Mn位；磁测量显示两个特征异常(~100-120K和~50-60K)，Cu浓度增加压制低温磁态；理论计算与实验矛盾，预测Cu占据方形平面位。
AI.conclusion: 该高度阻挫的四重钙钛矿体系中存在局部键合、短程无序和亚稳态之间的强竞争，实验与理论结果的差异揭示了对该体系理解的复杂性。

title: Variational Monte Carlo study of a two-orbital Hubbard model for the iron pnictides
summary: We study a two-orbital Hubbard-Kanamori model, which has been originally proposed for iron-based superconductors, using variational Monte Carlo. We span the nonmagnetic sector at both hole-doping and electron-doping, with respect to the half-filled case $n=2$. We report the presence of a superconductive region with a $s^{\pm}$ symmetry only when the half-filled system is in a Mott state, while orbital selectivity is absent. These results are qualitatively different from what was reported in the three-orbital Hubbard-Kanamori model, where a more extended superconductive region was observed with a concomitant development of orbital selectivity, and they are to some extent more reminiscent of the single-band Hubbard model.

AI.tldr: 通过变分蒙特卡洛研究两轨道Hubbard-Kanamori模型，发现仅在半满体系处于Mott态时才存在s±对称性的超导区域，且无轨道选择性。这与三轨道模型的结果定性不同，更接近单带Hubbard模型。
AI.motivation: 探究两轨道Hubbard-Kanamori模型（最初为铁基超导体提出）中，轨道选择性对超导配对对称性及超导区域存在性的影响。
AI.method: 采用变分蒙特卡洛（Variational Monte Carlo）方法，研究两轨道Hubbard-Kanamori模型在空穴掺杂和电子掺杂下的非磁性区域。
AI.result: 1) 仅在半满体系处于Mott态时存在s±对称性的超导区域；2) 没有观察到轨道选择性；3) 与三轨道模型的结果定性不同，更接近单带Hubbard模型。
AI.conclusion: 两轨道模型的超导行为与三轨道模型有显著差异，轨道数减少削弱了轨道选择性效应，使超导机制更接近单带Hubbard模型。

title: Quantum geometric anomalous Hall response in orbitally nonunitary superconductors
summary: We investigate the anomalous Hall response (AHR) in a multiband superconductor at optical frequencies, a phenomenon intimately related to the polar Kerr effect, a key probe of time-reversal symmetry breaking in superconductors. In translationally invariant multiband systems with purely intraband pairing, Galilean invariance decouples center-of-mass and relative motion of Cooper pairs, leading to the widespread expectation that a finite AHR requires either disorder or finite interband pairing amplitudes. However, this restriction can be lifted by the quantum geometric effects inherent to multiband Bloch states. Using a honeycomb lattice tight-binding model with Kane-Mele spin-orbit coupling, we analyze the AHR for the time-reversal symmetry broken chiral $d$-wave spin-singlet and chiral $p$-wave equal-spin-triplet pairing states with intraband pairing only. We demonstrate, through both analytical and numerical calculations, that the spin-singlet state yields a vanishing AHR, even with its broken time-reversal symmetry, whereas the equal-spin triplet state exhibits a finite AHR, even when it is spin-unitary. We attribute the latter to orbital nonunitarity, which, in the presence of spin-orbit coupling, generates the spin-polarized Bogoliubov quasiparticle states required for a finite AHR. The response is mediated by interband velocity matrix elements governed by the quantum geometry. This finding establishes that spin-unitary, but orbitally nonunitary pairing, can generate a finite AHR even without interband pairing and thereby revises the criteria for Kerr signals in superconductors.

AI.tldr: 本文研究多带超导体在光频下的反常霍尔响应（AHR），发现在纯带内配对且无杂质或带间配对情况下，手性d波自旋单态不产生AHR，而手性p波等自旋三重态因轨道非幺正性产生有限AHR，该响应由量子几何介导的带间速度矩阵元决定。
AI.motivation: 传统观点认为，在平移不变的多带系统中，纯带内配对下需要无序或带间配对才能产生有限的反常霍尔响应。作者试图探究量子几何效应是否能突破这一限制，从而重新审视超导体中Kerr信号的判据。
AI.method: 采用蜂巢晶格紧束缚模型，引入Kane-Mele自旋-轨道耦合，分别分析时间反演对称性破缺的手性d波自旋单态和手性p波等自旋三重态配对。通过解析和数值计算，考察两种配对态的AHR行为。
AI.result: 自旋单态即使时间反演对称性破缺，AHR仍为零；等自旋三重态虽为自旋幺正，但因轨道非幺正性产生有限AHR。该响应由量子几何控制的带间速度矩阵元介导。
AI.conclusion: 自旋幺正但轨道非幺正的配对态可在无带间配对下产生有限AHR，修正了超导体中Kerr信号的判据，强调了量子几何和轨道非幺正性的关键作用。

title: Orbital-optimized density functional calculations of excited electronic states: Recent advances and perspectives
summary: Orbital-optimized (OO) density functional calculations provide a time-independent, variational route to electronic excitations that complements the presently widely used time-dependent density functional theory (TDDFT). As the orbitals are optimized in a state specific way, these methods can provide a balanced description of excited states with different character, thereby overcoming several limitations of practical implementations of TDDFT. Driven by recent developments in algorithms for obtained excited states as saddle points on the electronic energy surface, OO methods have seen an increased interest in recent years, maturing into an an active and rapidly developing area of research. Here, the theoretical foundations of the approach are clarified and an overview of the recent developments in methods for excited-state orbital optimization is provided. A unified overview of methods for treating open-shell singlet excited states and current approaches for computing transition properties and spectra is also provided. Finally, recent applications to molecular Rydberg, charge-transfer, and core excitations are reviewed, with the aim of assessing the present accuracy and range of applicability of OO density functional calculations.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了轨道优化（OO）密度泛函方法在电子激发态计算中的理论基础、最新进展及应用，该方法作为TDDFT的互补方案，通过变分轨道优化克服了传统方法的局限性。
AI.motivation: TDDFT在实际应用中存在局限性（如对电荷转移、里德堡等激发态描述不均衡），而OO方法可以通过态特异性轨道优化提供更平衡的描述，因此需要系统梳理其理论基础和最新进展。
AI.method: OO方法通过态特异性优化轨道来获得激发态鞍点解，本文系统总结了其理论框架、开壳层单重态处理方法、跃迁性质与光谱计算方法，并综述了在分子里德堡、电荷转移和核心激发等领域的应用。
AI.result: OO方法在描述里德堡激发、电荷转移激发和核心激发方面展现了良好精度，克服了TDDFT的部分局限性，已成为活跃发展的研究领域。
AI.conclusion: OO密度泛函方法是TDDFT的重要补充，在特定类型激发态计算中有独特优势，未来有广阔的应用前景。

title: Understanding quantum behaviors of an electron in a uniform magnetic field alternatively
summary: Quantum mechanically, an electron moving in a uniform magnetic field forms Landau levels. A curious feature is that for states with a negative angular quantum number, the total probability current vanishes, which appears to contradict the classical picture of cyclotron motion. While a geometric interpretation based on classical orbits exists, alternative interpretations remain of interest. In this paper, we examine the probability current density and identify a critical radius that naturally partitions the plane into an inner clockwise-flow region and an outer counterclockwise-flow region. We show that the vanishing total current results from an exact cancellation between these two regions. Furthermore, by defining a partitioned kinetic angular momentum with respect to the critical radius, we reveal an intrinsic competitive structure: the electron simultaneously carries two opposing rotational components. The negative quantum number manifests in the strength of the inner counter-rotation, while the net kinetic angular momentum remains positive. This bidirectional flow picture also provides a dynamical interpretation of the infinite degeneracy of Landau levels.

AI.tldr: 该论文揭示了均匀磁场中电子（朗道能级）的一个反直觉现象：尽管负角动量量子数态的总概率电流为零，但存在一个临界半径将平面自然划分为内顺时针流和外逆时针流两个区域，总电流的消失源于这两个区域电流的精确抵消。通过定义相对于临界半径的分区动能角动量，论文展示了电子同时携带两个相反的旋转分量，负量子数体现为内部逆向旋转的强度，而净动能角动量保持为正。这种双向流图景还为朗道能级的无限简并性提供了动力学解释。
AI.motivation: 澄清负角动量量子数的朗道能级中总概率电流为零这一看似与经典回旋运动图像矛盾的量子现象，并寻求超越已有几何轨道解释的替代理解方式。
AI.method: 通过分析概率电流密度，识别出临界半径；基于该临界半径定义分区动能角动量，构建双向流分析框架。
AI.result: 发现临界半径将平面分为内顺时针流和外逆时针流两个区域，总电流为零源于两者的精确抵消；负量子数体现为内区逆向旋转的强度，净角动量仍为正。
AI.conclusion: 该双向流图像不仅解释了总电流消失的机制，还为朗道能级的无限简并性提供了新的动力学视角。

title: Extending the La Solubility Limit in Sr$_3$Ir$_2$O$_7$ through High-Pressure High-Temperature Synthesis
summary: La-doped bilayer iridates provide an important platform for studying the evolution of the spin-orbit-assisted Mott state under electron doping, but the La solubility achieved by conventional ambient-pressure synthesis is limited. Here, we report the synthesis and physical properties of nominally La-doped (Sr$_{1-x}$La$_x$)$_3$Ir$_2$O$_7$ (x = 0.05, 0.10, 0.15, and 0.20) prepared using high-pressure high-temperature techniques. Single-crystal X-ray diffraction refinements, supported by scanning electron microscopy-energy-dispersive X-ray spectroscopy (SEM-EDX), reveal significantly enhanced La incorporation, with nominal x = 0.05 and 0.15 corresponding to actual compositions of approximately (Sr$_{0.89}$La$_{0.11}$)$_3$Ir$_2$O$_7$ and (Sr$_{0.77}$La$_{0.23}$)$_3$Ir$_2$O$_7$, respectively. At nominal x = 0.20, the bilayer phase is no longer stabilized and instead transforms into cubic perovskite Sr$_{1-x}$La$_x$IrO$_3$. (Sr$_{0.89}$La$_{0.11}$)$_3$Ir$_2$O$_7$ exhibits a ferromagnetic-like transition near 186 K accompanied by magnetic hysteresis and subtle lattice anomalies indicative of spin-lattice coupling. Despite its high electron-doping level, the compound remains strongly insulating, consistent with a heavily doped localized magnetic insulating state distinct from both parent Sr$_3$Ir$_2$O$_7$ and ambient-pressure La-doped samples. In contrast, (Sr$_{0.77}$La$_{0.23}$)$_3$Ir$_2$O$_7$ displays metal-like electronic behavior, weakened magnetic order, and enhanced carrier delocalization, although disorder-driven localization persists at low temperatures. These results demonstrate that high-pressure synthesis substantially extends the accessible doping range of bilayer iridates and reveals electronic and magnetic states inaccessible through conventional synthesis routes.

AI.tldr: 本文利用高压高温技术成功制备了高La掺杂的(Sr₁₋ₓLaₓ)₃Ir₂O₇双层铱氧化物，突破了传统常压合成的掺杂极限，发现x=0.11时呈现铁磁绝缘态，x=0.23时呈现类金属导电行为，揭示了电子掺杂诱导的丰富物相演变。
AI.motivation: 双层铱氧化物是研究自旋-轨道辅助Mott态在电子掺杂下演化的理想平台，但传统常压合成方法对La的溶解度有限，限制了对其电子掺杂效应的深入探索。因此，作者采用高压高温技术试图扩展La掺杂范围，研究更高电子掺杂下体系电子态和磁性的演化规律。
AI.method: 采用高压高温技术合成了名义组分为(Sr₁₋ₓLaₓ)₃Ir₂O₇ (x=0.05, 0.10, 0.15, 0.20)的系列样品；利用单晶X射线衍射精修和扫描电子显微镜-能量色散X射线光谱（SEM-EDX）确定实际La含量；通过磁化率、电阻率和晶格参数测量表征样品的电磁性质及结构变化。
AI.result: 高压合成实现了远高于常压的La掺杂量：名义x=0.05和0.15分别对应实际组成(Sr₀.₈₉La₀.₁₁)₃Ir₂O₇和(Sr₀.₇₇La₀.₂₃)₃Ir₂O₇；x=0.20时双层相不再稳定，转变为立方钙钛矿相。(Sr₀.₈₉La₀.₁₁)₃Ir₂O₇在186 K附近出现类铁磁转变并伴随磁滞回线和晶格异常，呈强绝缘态；而(Sr₀.₇₇La₀.₂₃)₃Ir₂O₇呈现类金属导电行为、磁性减弱、载流子离域化增强，但低温下仍有局域化行为。
AI.conclusion: 高压合成技术显著扩展了双层铱氧化物的电子掺杂范围，揭示了在常压合成无法达到的高掺杂区存在从铁磁绝缘态到弱磁性类金属态的转变，为理解强自旋-轨道耦合体系中的电子掺杂效应提供了新视角，表明高压方法是探索该类材料新奇物相和物性的有效手段。

title: Overview of the Theory of Extremely Correlated Fermi Liquids
summary: The Extremely Correlated Fermi Liquids (ECFL) theory is reviewed as a framework for understanding the $t$-$J$ model in metallic systems close to the Mott insulating limit. This overview presents the underlying ideas and the resulting equations in a form accessible to nonexperts. We compare theoretical results with all available resistivity data for single-layer High-T$_{c}$ systems, and with some spectral data. The highlighted results include a density dependent quasilinear T-dependence in resistivity, an unusually small quasiparticle weight, and distinct low-temperature emergent scales that dominate transport, thermodynamics and spectral properties of single-layer High T$_c$ systems. Suggestions are made for further experiments to probe the physics of these challenging quantum many-body systems.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了极端关联费米液体（ECFL）理论作为理解金属态中接近Mott绝缘极限的t-J模型的框架，并将理论结果与单层高温超导体的电阻率和光谱数据进行了比较，揭示了密度依赖的准线性电阻温度关系、异常小的准粒子权重以及低温涌现尺度。
AI.motivation: 为理解接近Mott绝缘极限的金属系统中t-J模型的强关联物理提供一个易于非专家理解的统一框架，并通过实验数据验证理论。
AI.method: 基于ECFL理论推导t-J模型在金属态下的方程，并与单层高温超导系统的电阻率及光谱实验数据进行系统性比较。
AI.result: 发现了密度依赖的准线性电阻温度关系、异常小的准粒子权重，以及支配输运、热力学和谱性质的低温涌现尺度。
AI.conclusion: ECFL理论能较好地解释单层高温超导体的关键实验现象，并为未来探索此类强关联量子多体系统的实验提供了建议。

title: Band-Selective Tunneling and Anisotropic Multiband Superconductivity in V$_2$Ga$_5$
summary: Multiband superconductors with structural anisotropy offer a fertile ground for exploring unconventional quantum states, yet disentangling their directional pairing characteristics remains a formidable challenge. Here, we present a comprehensive thermodynamic and spectroscopic study of the tetragonal intermetallic superconductor $\text{V}_2\text{Ga}_5$ ($T_{\rm c} \approx 3.5$~K), combining first-principles electronic structure calculations with highly sensitive AC calorimetry and directional low-temperature scanning tunneling spectroscopy. By constructing a self-consistent, anisotropic multiband singlet $s$-wave pairing model within the fully symmetric $A_{1g}$ representation, we successfully reconcile the experimental specific heat and upper critical field anomalies. Crucially, we reveal that the apparent reversal of bulk gap hierarchies in directional tunneling experiments is a direct consequence of band-selective tunneling. This effect is governed by an elegant interplay between localized Fermi velocity 'hot spots' and specific Fermi surface topologies, rather than raw thermodynamic gap magnitudes alone. Our findings provide a clear microscopic picture of direction-dependent, band-selective tunneling in a highly uniaxial anisotropic superconductor, demonstrating how orientation-dependent transport constraints shape the observable signatures of multiband quantum condensates.

AI.tldr: 本文通过理论计算与实验相结合，构建了各向异性多带s波配对模型，揭示了V₂Ga₅超导体中方向依赖的能带选择性隧穿效应及其对观测信号的调控机制。
AI.motivation: 多带超导体中方向性配对特征的区分是巨大挑战，现有方法难以有效解耦各向异性结构中不同能带的超导特性。
AI.method: 结合第一性原理电子结构计算、高灵敏AC量热法、方向性低温扫描隧道谱，构建全对称A₁g表示下的自洽各向异性多带单重态s波配对模型。
AI.result: 成功解释比热和上临界场异常，发现方向隧穿实验中能隙层次的反转是能带选择性隧穿的结果，受费米速度"热点"和费米面拓扑共同调控。
AI.conclusion: 建立了方向依赖、能带选择性隧穿的清晰微观图像，展示了隧穿约束如何塑造多带量子凝聚体的可观测特征。

title: Spin-Polarized Oxygen Evolution in Chiral-Molecule-Modified Plasmonic Photoanodes
summary: Photoelectrochemical oxygen evolution is limited not only by multi-electron charge-transfer kinetics but also by the spin constraints associated with forming triplet O2. Here, we integrate plasmonic hot-carrier generation, chiral molecular spin selectivity, and oxygen-evolution catalysis within a single hybrid photoanode architecture demonstrating enhanced O2 generated via spin-polarized plasmonic hot holes. TiO2 photoanodes were modified with achiral Au nanoparticles to introduce visible-light plasmonic absorption, functionalized with cysteine as a chiral molecular interface, and coated with a NiFe-based oxygen-evolution catalyst. Wavelength-resolved photo-scanning electrochemical microscopy was used to directly detect locally evolved O2 under operando illumination while simultaneously monitoring the photoanode current. Chiral functionalization with homochiral L-cysteine enhanced both photocurrent and local O2 evolution relative to racemic DL-cysteine controls. The chirality-dependent enhancement was most pronounced under visible excitation overlapping the Au plasmon resonance, including a 130% photocurrent increase. These results provide evidence that chiral molecular layers, often used for chiral nanoparticle synthesis, can directly modulate plasmon-derived hot-carrier transfer through the chiral induced spin selectivity effect. This work establishes a chiral plasmonic photoelectrochemical platform for coupling hot-carrier generation to spin-dependent water oxidation.

AI.tldr: 本研究构建了一种手性等离子体光阳极，通过将等离激元热载流子生成、手性分子自旋选择性与析氧催化相结合，利用自旋极化热空穴增强氧气析出，在可见光激发下光电流提升130%。
AI.motivation: 光电化学析氧反应不仅受多电子电荷转移动力学限制，还受自旋约束（生成三重态O₂的自旋翻转过程）的限制。现有方法未能有效利用自旋选择性来克服这一瓶颈。
AI.method: 在TiO₂光阳极上修饰非手性Au纳米颗粒引入可见光等离激元吸收，然后功能化半胱氨酸作为手性分子界面，最后涂覆NiFe基析氧催化剂。利用波长分辨光扫描电化学显微镜原位检测局部O₂生成。
AI.result: 同手性L-半胱氨酸功能化相比外消旋DL-半胱氨酸对照组，光电流和局部O₂生成均显著增强。在Au等离激元共振的可见光激发下，光电流提升130%。
AI.conclusion: 手性分子层可通过手性诱导自旋选择性效应直接调控等离激元热载流子转移，为耦合热载流子生成与自旋依赖性水氧化提供了新的手性等离子体光电化学平台。

title: Phonon polariton confinement in isotopically pure MOVPE-grown BN triangles
summary: Phonon polaritons, quasiparticles formed by the resonant hybridization of light and lattice vibrations, exhibit unique properties like the possibility of hyperbolic dispersions. In this context, exfoliated hexagonal boron nitride (hBN) has emerged as a promising material for phonon polariton-based research. However, to advance toward practical applications, it is essential to demonstrate efficient phonon-polariton propagation and confinement in large-area epitaxial BN. To address this topic, we use metalorganic vapor phase epitaxy (MOVPE)-grown BN and investigate the phonon polariton properties using scattering-type scanning near-field optical microscopy (s-SNOM) and nanoscale Fourier transform infrared spectroscopy (nano-FTIR). We report remarkably long phonon polariton propagation lengths, indicating the high crystalline quality of the BN layer. By using epitaxially grown isotopically pure triangular islands, we further demonstrate efficient phonon-polariton confinement with mode patterns tunable by the incident light wavelength. Our results pave the way for implementing all-epitaxial, microscale, high-quality polariton resonators for nanophotonics and quantum optics.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了MOVPE生长的外延氮化硼（BN）中声子极化子的传播与限制特性，展示了长传播距离和可通过入射光波长调控的模式图案，为全外延微纳光子学和量子光学极化子谐振器铺平了道路。
AI.motivation: 为推动声子极化子走向实际应用，需要在**大面积外延BN**中实现高效的声子极化子传播和限制，而此前研究多基于剥离的hBN。
AI.method: 采用**MOVPE生长BN**，利用**散射型扫描近场光学显微镜（s-SNOM）**和**纳米级傅里叶变换红外光谱（nano-FTIR）**研究声子极化子性质，并利用**同位素纯三角形岛**进一步展示极化子限制。
AI.result: 观察到**极长的声子极化子传播长度**，表明BN层具有高晶体质量；通过同位素纯三角形岛实现了**高效的极化子限制**，且模式图案可通过入射光波长调控。
AI.conclusion: 该结果为实现**全外延、微米级、高质量极化子谐振器**在纳米光子学和量子光学中的应用奠定了基础。

title: Water Flow Through Polar and Non-Polar Nanopores: Insights from Multiscale Simulations
summary: Global water stress has emerged as a critical challenge, driving the search for advanced membrane materials that enable efficient, selective water filtration and transport. In this context, two-dimensional nanoporous membranes provide an ideal platform to elucidate how atomic-scale structure and electronic polarization govern water flow under extreme confinement. In this study, we employ multiscale simulations to investigate the effect of water flow through nanopores in graphene and hexagonal boron nitride (hBN) membranes. Our results reveal significantly higher water flow in hBN membranes than in graphene. This enhanced flow is attributed to the asymmetry of the hBN pores, which induces an electric dipole moment, as confirmed by quantum-mechanical (QM) calculations. Classical molecular dynamics simulations further demonstrate that water molecules exhibit a random distribution with no preferential orientation near the graphene pores, whereas hBN induces strong structuring. Furthermore, hybrid quantum mechanics/molecular mechanics (QM/MM) simulations indicate that the dipole moment of the hBN pore increases in the presence of water, as evidenced by the average charge distribution. Conversely, the symmetric nature of graphene pores results in non-polar characteristics, as verified by both QM/MM and QM calculations. These findings provide valuable insights into the distinct water-transport properties when flowing through graphene and hBN nanopores, with potential implications for designing advanced nanofiltration membranes.

AI.tldr: 通过多尺度模拟发现，六方氮化硼（hBN）纳米孔膜的水通量显著高于石墨烯膜，原因在于hBN孔的不对称性诱导了电偶极矩，增强了水分子结构化和传输性能。
AI.motivation: 全球水资源短缺驱动了对高效选择性膜材料的探索，二维纳米多孔膜为理解原子尺度结构和电子极化如何影响极端限域下的水流动提供了理想平台。
AI.method: 采用多尺度模拟方法，包括量子力学（QM）计算、经典分子动力学（MD）模拟以及混合量子力学/分子力学（QM/MM）模拟，对比研究石墨烯和hBN纳米孔膜中的水流动行为。
AI.result: hBN膜的水通量显著高于石墨烯膜；hBN孔的不对称性诱导了电偶极矩，水分子在hBN孔附近呈现强结构化分布，而石墨烯孔附近水分子随机分布无偏好取向；QM/MM显示hBN孔偶极矩在水的存在下进一步增大。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了石墨烯和hBN纳米孔膜中水传输特性的差异机制，为设计先进纳滤膜提供了重要见解。

title: Intrinsic Ductility from Shear Amorphization: From Pure Metals to Multi-Principal-Element Alloys
summary: Direct links between electronic structure and intrinsic ductility remain elusive for metals. A framework is proposed that reduces the complexities of valence charge distribution, band filling, and shear strain effects into structure-property relationships describing the intrinsic ductility of metals and alloys. Rather than relying on crystal cleavage and dislocation nucleation at preexisting crack tips, we show that a lower energy fracture criterion, i.e., the activation energy density for amorphization, enables accurate predictions of both intrinsic ductility and ductile-to-brittle transition temperatures. From analytical expressions and tabulated ab-initio stiffness constants, lattice parameters, and binary interaction energies, we present a unified theory that reconciles ductile flow in pure metals and solid-solution alloys. Phase diagrams generated for the Nb-Ta-V-Ti system simultaneously explain its high strength and room-temperature tensile ductility, validating this framework as a practical one for rapid design of structural multi-principal-element alloys.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于电子结构的统一理论框架，通过非晶化激活能密度而非传统裂纹扩展判据，准确预测金属及合金的本征延展性和韧脆转变温度，并在Nb-Ta-V-Ti体系中得到验证。
AI.motivation: 电子结构与金属本征延展性之间的直接关联长期不明确，传统依赖裂纹尖端解理和位错形核的判据不够准确，亟需一个更底层且实用的理论框架来指导高延展性多主元合金的设计。
AI.method: 将价电荷分布、能带填充和剪切应变效应简化为结构-性能关系；提出以非晶化激活能密度作为更低能量的断裂判据；结合第一性原理计算的刚度常数、晶格参数和二元相互作用能，构建统一理论。
AI.result: 该框架准确预测了纯金属和固溶体合金的延展性及韧脆转变温度；生成的Nb-Ta-V-Ti系相图同时解释了其高强度和室温拉伸延展性，验证了方法的实用性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为快速设计高性能结构多主元合金提供了实用工具，统一了纯金属和固溶体合金的延展性描述，建立了电子结构到宏观力学性能的桥梁。

title: Micron-sized magnonic 3-port rectilinear circulator
comment: 10 pages, 4 figures, plus Appendix. Submitted to Physical Review Applied
summary: The development of miniaturized non-reciprocal microwave technologies compatible with integrated circuit architectures remains a critical challenge for modern information technology. Here, we present the first experimental characterization of a micron-sized prototypical magnon circulator. Taking advantage of the chiral excitation of spin-waves via nanowire gratings, we propose an original design of a circulator involving three channels of rectilinear and unidirectional spin-wave beams. We demonstrate via a full 3-port spin-wave spectroscopy a genuine spin-wave circulation between the three ports. The narrow frequency band of operation can be tuned over a broad range of frequencies ($2$-$8$ GHz) with both an external field of up to $100$ mT, and the dimensions of the grating specifying the wavevectors. This proposed scheme opens up possibilities for new architectures of integrated and miniaturized non-reciprocal microwave devices.

AI.tldr: 本文首次实验展示了一种微米级原型磁振子环形器，利用纳米线光栅手性激发自旋波，实现了三个端口间的自旋波循环，工作频率2-8 GHz可调，为集成化非互易微波器件提供了新方案。
AI.motivation: 开发与集成电路架构兼容的小型化非互易微波技术是现代信息技术的关键挑战，现有方案难以同时满足微型化和集成化需求。
AI.method: 利用纳米线光栅实现自旋波的手性激发，设计了三通道直线单向自旋波束的环形器结构，通过完整的三端口自旋波谱学进行表征验证。
AI.result: 成功实现了三端口间的自旋波循环现象；工作频带窄但可通过外加磁场（最高100 mT）和光栅尺寸在2-8 GHz范围内调谐。
AI.conclusion: 该方案为集成化、小型化非互易微波器件的架构设计开辟了新可能性。

title: Decoding Crystallographic Surface Chirality with Machine Learning: From Atomic Geometry to Fermi Surface Projections
summary: Intrinsically chiral metal surfaces, where handedness arises from the asymmetric step-kink-terrace topology of high-Miller-index planes, are model systems for enantiospecific catalysis, sensing, and spintronics. Yet, no consistent method exists to classify their handedness directly from experimental observables. We report a dual-domain machine learning framework that decodes crystallographic surface chirality from two independent image representations: atomic structure models in real space and simulated momentum-resolved photoemission maps of the Fermi surface projections in reciprocal space. ResNet18, a deep convolutional neural network, fine-tuned on a database of labeled images achieves ~73% classification accuracy on atomic models and ~99% on Fermi surface projections. We show that the latter transfers directly to synchrotron-acquired experimental images after fine-tuning on just two labeled frames. We identify a working correspondence between the two representations: just as the kink site geometry fixes the orientation of crystallographic planes in real space, the surface normal position in a momentum-resolved photoemission map anchors the orientation of the Fermi surface polygons in reciprocal space. It is precisely this relative orientation that encodes handedness into the map topology with high accuracy. The pronounced difference in accuracy shows that handedness is more readily recovered from the momentum-space electronic pattern than from the local atomic geometry of the kinked surface. This finding has direct implications for the disorder resilience of geometric chiral-induced spin selectivity (CISS) at realistic metal surfaces.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个双域机器学习框架，利用原子结构模型（实空间）和费米面投影的光电子发射图谱（动量空间）解码 intrinsically chiral 金属表面的手性，在实验图像上达到 ~99% 的分类准确率，并揭示手性信息在动量空间比实空间更易恢复。
AI.motivation: 高米勒指数金属表面的手性源于不对称的台阶-扭结-平台拓扑结构，是研究对映特异性催化、传感和自旋电子学的模型系统，但目前缺乏直接从实验观测量中分类其手性的一致方法。
AI.method: 构建双域机器学习框架：在实空间使用原子结构模型图像，在动量空间使用模拟的动量分辨光电子发射谱（费米面投影）；采用预训练的 ResNet18 深度卷积神经网络进行微调分类。
AI.result: 原子结构模型分类准确率约73%，费米面投影分类准确率约99%；后者仅用两帧标记图像微调即可直接迁移到同步辐射实验图像。
AI.conclusion: 手性信息在动量空间的电子图案中比在实空间的局域原子几何中更容易恢复，这对几何手性诱导自旋选择性（CISS）在真实金属表面的无序鲁棒性有直接启示。

title: Engineering electrically-switchable quantum anomalous Hall states by spin-orbit coupling
summary: Nonvolatile gate-driven switching of quantum anomalous Hall (QAH) states in graphene moiré systems provides a promising route toward topological electronics based on chiral edge states. However, deliberate use of this switching mechanism requires control over both the magnetic properties and metastability of QAH states. While previous demonstrations mostly relied on the intrinsic magnetic energy landscape of moiré devices, here we show that this landscape can be engineered through proximity coupling to WSe2. We find that proximitizing twisted monolayer-bilayer graphene by WSe2 reshapes the magnetization reversals responsible for nonvolatile electrical switching of QAH states. We attribute this effect to the proximity-induced spin-orbit coupling (SOC), which can lock spin and valley and modify the magnetization of the competing states involved in switching compared with non-proximitized graphene systems. Our findings establish proximity-induced SOC as a new way to engineer magnetic properties and switchable magnetic states in graphene-based systems. We further demonstrate that strong magnetic metastability in tMBG allows the magnetic states to be gate-tuned between QAH and metallic regimes, and between QAH states with Chern numbers |C| = 2 and 1 without resetting the magnetic state. This functionality points toward new device architectures based on QAH chiral edge states.

AI.tldr: 本文研究通过WSe2近邻耦合调控扭曲单层-双层石墨烯（tMBG）中量子反常霍尔（QAH）态的非易失性栅极开关，发现近邻诱导的自旋-轨道耦合（SOC）能够锁定自旋和谷自由度，重塑磁化反转行为，从而实现Chern数|C|=2和1之间的栅极可调切换。
AI.motivation: 现有石墨烯莫尔体系中QAH态的非易失性开关主要依赖固有的磁性能量景观，但缺乏对磁性质和亚稳态的控制手段，亟需发展新的调控方法以实现拓扑电子学的实际应用。
AI.method: 通过将扭曲单层-双层石墨烯（tMBG）与WSe2近邻耦合，利用近邻诱导的自旋-轨道耦合（SOC）来改变竞争态的磁化特性，从而重塑磁化反转行为，实现QAH态的非易失性电学开关。
AI.result: WSe2近邻耦合显著重塑了tMBG中的磁化反转行为；实现了栅极对磁态的调控，可在QAH态和金属态之间切换，以及在Chern数|C|=2和1之间切换，无需重置磁态。
AI.conclusion: 近邻诱导的SOC是调控石墨烯基体系中磁性质和可开关磁态的新手段，为基于QAH手性边缘态的新型器件架构提供了可能。

title: A wrong ground-state structure of HfO$_2$ predicted by machine-learning interatomic potentials based on the PBE functional
summary: Machine-learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) have become powerful tools for material simulations. Many MLIPs are trained based on density functional theory (DFT) datasets generated with the Perdew-Burke-Ernzerhof (PBE) exchange-correlation functional. Using a PBE-based MLIP for HfO2, we identify a previously unreported low-energy I41/amd structure, which is predicted to be more stable than the well-known ground-state structure, the monoclinic P21/c structure. Since experiments show clearly that HfO2 takes the P21/c structure as the ground state, this is obviously a wrong prediction. Unfortunately, the same prediction is also made by widely used PBE-based foundation models such as NequIP-OAM-L and MatterSim-v1-5M. Comparisons among different DFT functionals show that this error originates from the PBE functional, which overstabilizes low-density structures containing sixfold Hf-O octahedral units, such as the I41/amd and Pbcn phases. The error also affects the calculated energy landscapes and barrier heights along ferroelectric HfO2 polarization switching paths when there are large lattice relaxations. Fortunately, the error can be largely suppressed by other functionals such as PBEsol and local density approximation. Our study serves as a warning about the impact of errors in exchange-correlation functional approximations on the reliability of MLIP simulations of crystal structures and phase transitions.

AI.tldr: 本文发现基于PBE泛函训练的机器学习势（MLIP）错误地将I41/amd结构预测为HfO2的基态，而实验表明单斜P21/c结构才是真正的基态。该错误源于PBE泛函过度稳定了含六重Hf-O八面体单元的低密度结构，并影响铁电相变路径的计算。使用PBEsol或LDA泛函可有效抑制该错误。
AI.motivation: 指出基于PBE泛函训练的MLIP在HfO2结构预测中存在严重错误，并揭示该错误源于PBE泛函本身对低密度六配位八面体结构的过度稳定化，提醒学界注意交换关联泛函近似误差对MLIP模拟可靠性的影响。
AI.method: 使用基于PBE的MLIP（以及NequIP-OAM-L、MatterSim-v1-5M等基础模型）预测HfO2晶体结构，与DFT不同泛函（PBE、PBEsol、LDA）的计算结果进行对比分析，验证误差来源。
AI.result: PBE-MLIP错误预测I41/amd结构比实验已知的P21/c基态更稳定；该错误同样出现在其他PBE基础模型上；错误源于PBE泛函过度稳定含六重Hf-O八面体单元的低密度相（如I41/amd和Pbcn）；该误差影响铁电相变路径的能量景观和势垒；PBEsol和LDA可有效抑制此误差。
AI.conclusion: PBE泛函的固有误差会传播到基于其训练的MLIP中，导致材料结构预测出错，特别是在涉及配位环境和密度变化的体系。选择更合适的泛函（如PBEsol或LDA）或对MLIP训练数据加以审慎筛选至关重要。

title: Leveraging rapid sintering to retain metastable zirconia in copper
summary: Cermets combining metastable ceramics and ductile metals promise superior toughness and strength. However, retaining metastability often requires high-temperature sintering that coarsens microstructures and relaxes matrix constraint. Here we introduce an ultrafast high-temperature sintering (UHS) strategy to overcome this trade-off in zirconia-copper cermets. By applying Joule heating at around 100 degrees C per second to 900 degrees C with only a 20 second hold, we obtained cermets containing up to 50 weight percent of metastable austenite in zirconia at room temperature within a fine-grained and homogeneous microstructure. The rapid sintering kinetically favors semi-thermal austenite formation while suppressing copper grain growth and matrix relaxation, thereby stabilizing the high-temperature phase and simultaneously preserving microstructural refinement. This approach offers significant potential for copper-based composites in applications such as transformation toughening, self-healing, and crack detection.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种超快高温烧结（UHS）策略，通过在约900°C下以100°C/s的速率快速加热并仅保温20秒，成功制备了含有高达50 wt%亚稳态奥氏体的氧化锆-铜金属陶瓷，实现了细晶均匀微观结构，克服了传统烧结中微观结构粗化和基体约束松弛的难题。
AI.motivation: 传统金属陶瓷烧结需要在高温下保持较长时间，这会导致微观结构粗化（晶粒长大）并松弛基体约束，从而难以同时实现高韧性（由亚稳相提供）和高强度（由细晶结构提供）。因此，需要一种新的烧结策略来打破这种trade-off。
AI.method: 采用超快高温烧结（UHS）技术，利用焦耳加热以约100°C/s的速率快速升温至900°C，仅保温20秒，快速冷却，从而在氧化锆-铜金属陶瓷中保留高含量的亚稳态奥氏体（最高50 wt%），同时保持细晶和均匀的微观结构。
AI.result: 成功制备了含有高达50 wt%亚稳态奥氏体的氧化锆-铜金属陶瓷，微观结构细晶且均匀，有效抑制了铜晶粒长大和基体松弛。
AI.conclusion: 该超快烧结策略为铜基复合材料在相变增韧、自修复和裂纹检测等应用领域提供了重要潜力，通过动力学控制实现了亚稳相保留与微观结构细化的兼得。

title: Conditional spinodal decomposition in Li-Mg anodes for lithium metal batteries
summary: The development of batteries with high energy density, short charging times and use of sustainable materials is critical for decarbonization. Magnesium (Mg)-based anodes for lithium (Li) metal batteries promote homogeneous Li plating, thereby avoiding the formation of Li dendrites that cause short circuits and battery failure. However, microstructural modifications induced by Li-alloying and their influence on battery operation remain elusive. Here, we unveil the previously unknown formation of an ordered B2 phase, which creates a conditional spinodal decomposition with the \b{eta}-body-centered cubic phase. Chemical fluctuations characteristic of spinodal decomposition give rise to uniformly dispersed Li-rich \b{eta}-BCC and Li-poor B2 continuous interconnected phases, with the former providing a fast diffusion pathway for Li diffusion towards the anode, hence decreasing the propensity for dendrite formation at elevated current density. This is achieved using Earth-abundant and inexpensive Mg.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了镁基负极中Li合金化诱导的B2有序相与β-BCC相之间的亚稳态调幅分解，形成均匀互连的富Li/贫Li双连续结构，促进Li快速扩散并抑制枝晶生长，为高能量密度、快充且可持续的锂金属电池提供了新思路。
AI.motivation: 开发高能量密度、快充且可持续的电池对脱碳至关重要。镁基负极可促进均匀锂沉积、避免枝晶，但Li合金化引起的微观结构变化及其对电池性能的影响尚不明确。
AI.method: 通过实验揭示镁基负极中先前未知的B2有序相形成，该相与β-BCC相发生亚稳态调幅分解，产生均匀分散的富Li β-BCC相和贫Li B2相，形成连续互连的双相结构。
AI.result: 调幅分解产生的化学波动形成了均匀分散的富Li β-BCC和贫Li B2连续互连相。富Li β-BCC相为Li向负极扩散提供了快速扩散通道，从而在高电流密度下降低枝晶形成的倾向。
AI.conclusion: 利用地球上丰富且廉价的镁，通过调幅分解形成的独特微观结构可有效抑制锂枝晶生长，为实现高能量密度、快充且可持续的锂金属电池提供了新策略。

title: Observation of orbital-angular-momentum-driven temperature modulation via the spin Peltier effect
summary: Angular-momentum transport provides a pathway for controlling energy flow in solids beyond conventional charge-based mechanisms. While spin currents are known to mediate spin-caloritronic phenomena such as the spin Peltier effect (SPE), the role of orbital angular momentum in heat transport remains largely unexplored. Here we demonstrate orbital-angular-momentum-driven temperature modulation via the SPE in yttrium iron garnet/Pt/CuOx heterostructures. Using wedge-shaped CuOx layers combined with spatially resolved active thermal measurement techniques, we map the continuous thickness dependence and quantitatively disentangle the spin- and orbital-current-mediated contributions within a single device. The orbital-mediated component exhibits a pronounced maximum at an intermediate thickness, revealing a characteristic length scale for interfacial orbital-angular-momentum generation and propagation at the Cu/CuOx interface. These results provide direct experimental evidence that charge-current-driven orbital angular momentum can drive SPE-induced temperature modulation, establishing interfacial orbital processes as an additional channel for heat transport and providing a pathway toward spin-orbit caloritronics.

AI.tldr: 本文在钇铁石榴石/Pt/CuOx异质结构中实验证明了轨道角动量驱动的自旋佩尔捷效应温度调制，通过楔形CuOx层和热测量技术，定量解析了自旋与轨道电流的贡献，揭示了界面轨道角动量生成和传播的特征长度尺度。
AI.motivation: 虽然自旋电流驱动的自旋佩尔捷效应已被研究，但轨道角动量在热传输中的作用尚未被探索，作者希望填补这一空白。
AI.method: 构建YIG/Pt/CuOx异质结构，采用楔形CuOx层结合空间分辨主动热测量技术，连续测量厚度依赖性，定量分离自旋与轨道电流的贡献。
AI.result: 轨道介导的SPE贡献在中间厚度处呈现显著最大值，揭示了Cu/CuOx界面轨道角动量生成和传播的特征长度尺度。
AI.conclusion: 实验证明电荷电流驱动的轨道角动量可以驱动SPE温度调制，界面轨道过程是热传输的新通道，为自旋-轨道量热电子学开辟了道路。

title: A Geometric Design Principle for $\mathbb{Z}_2$ Topological Phases in Twisted Triangular-Lattice Bilayers
summary: Twisted van der Waals bilayers provide a versatile platform for engineering moiré electronic states, yet a general design principle for time-reversal-invariant topological moiré bands remains elusive. Here, we establish a geometry-driven principle for triangular-lattice bilayers: symmetry-related minima of the stacking-energy landscape are promoted by twist and relaxation into the two sublattices of an emergent honeycomb moiré lattice. First-principles calculations for BiTeBr reveal robust $Γ$-valley moiré valence bands with a nontrivial $\mathbb{Z}_2$ index over a range of twist angles. A four-band Wannier Hamiltonian in the emergent honeycomb basis quantitatively maps these bands onto an extended Kane--Mele model. An out-of-plane electric field drives a transition to a trivial phase by enhancing the Rashba coupling $λ_R$ relative to the intrinsic Kane--Mele coupling $λ_{\rm SO}$. The same honeycomb reconstruction and Kane--Mele mechanism are verified in representative additional triangular-lattice bilayers, establishing stacking reconstruction as a general, geometry-controlled route to electrically tunable moiré quantum spin Hall materials.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于堆叠重构的几何驱动原理，用于在三角晶格双层材料中实现时间反演不变的拓扑moiré能带。以BiTeBr为例，第一性原理计算表明其moire价带具有非平庸的Z₂拓扑指标，并通过扩展Kane-Mele模型进行定量描述。外加电场可通过增强Rashba耦合诱导拓扑相变。该机制在多种三角晶格双层中普适成立，为电可调moire量子自旋霍尔材料提供了通用设计路线。
AI.motivation: 为时间反演不变的拓扑moiré能带建立通用的设计原理。现有研究缺乏普适的几何驱动原则来指导这类拓扑moire能带的构造。
AI.method: 通过几何分析提出堆叠重构驱动蜂窝状moire晶格形成的原理，结合第一性原理计算（BiTeBr等材料）和四带Wannier哈密顿量建模，将moire能带映射到扩展Kane-Mele模型，并通过外加电场调控拓扑性质。
AI.result: BiTeBr的moire价带在多个转角下表现出非平庸的Z₂拓扑指标；四带Wannier哈密顿量成功定量映射到扩展Kane-Mele模型；外加电场通过增强Rashba耦合相对于Kane-Mele耦合的比率，驱动拓扑到平庸相变；该机制在多种三角晶格双层中得到验证。
AI.conclusion: 堆叠重构是一种通用的、几何控制的路线，可用于构建电可调的moire量子自旋霍尔材料，为设计新型拓扑量子材料提供了指导原则。

title: Holonomy Analysis of Optical-polarization Temperature Trajectories in Stress-induced Ferroelectric SrTiO$_3$
summary: We develop a data-induced geometric framework for temperature trajectories in optical-polarization data and apply it to temperature-dependent birefringence imaging of stress-induced ferroelectric SrTiO$_3$. By treating the measured response as an observable projection of local material states, the optical-polarization response at each pixel is cast as a trajectory along the temperature axis. Singular value decomposition separates trajectory-induced geometric objects associated with optical-polarization-direction structure and temperature-evolution modes. Holonomies are then defined by transporting these objects around closed loops in real space. The resulting maps reveal spatially localized connection mismatches correlated with an enhanced ferroelectric transition temperature and stress-related optical anisotropy. Local order parameters and angular-gradient analyses confirm that these loop-level signals are distinct from orientational disorder and simple spatial variation. The signed holonomy of the temperature-evolution modes further resolves positive and negative connection structures under a fixed frame convention. These results demonstrate that the data-induced connection geometry of temperature trajectories provides an experimentally accessible diagnostic of electromechanical inhomogeneity in SrTiO$_3$ under stress, without explicitly reconstructing hidden strain or electric-polarization fields.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种数据驱动的几何框架，将光学偏振的温度响应视为轨迹，通过奇异值分解提取几何对象并定义空间环路平移（holonomy），从而在不显式重构应变或极化场的情况下，诊断SrTiO₃中与应力相关的铁电不均匀性。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以直接测量应力下铁电材料中隐藏的应变或极化场，亟需一种可直接从实验数据中提取电-机械不均匀性诊断信号的几何方法。
AI.method: 1. 将每个像素的光学偏振响应视为沿温度轴的轨迹；2. 利用奇异值分解分离与偏振方向结构和温度演化模式相关的几何对象；3. 在实空间中沿闭合环路平移这些对象，定义holonomy（和乐）；4. 通过局域序参量和角梯度分析验证信号不同于取向无序和简单空间变化。
AI.result: 得到的holonomy图显示出与增强铁电转变温度和应力相关光学各向异性相关的空间局域连接错配。温度演化模式的带符号holonomy进一步在固定框架下分辨出正负连接结构。
AI.conclusion: 数据诱导的连接几何为应力下SrTiO₃的电-机械不均匀性提供了一种实验可及的诊断工具，无需显式重构隐藏的应变或极化场。

title: Enhanced Photocurrent Response in Epitaxial 0.5PZT-0.5PFN Multiferroic Thin Films
summary: The exploration of novel multiferroic materials with strong coupling between ferroelectric polarization and photovoltaic effects is crucial for next-generation optoelectronic devices. In this study, we characterized highly oriented 0.5Pb(Zr0.52Ti0.48)O3-0.5Pb(Fe0.5Nb0.5)O3 multiferroic thin films grown by pulsed laser deposition on SrTiO3 (001) substrates with a SrRuO3 bottom electrode. The films exhibited excellent crystalline quality, with a single perovskite phase and (001) orientation. They displayed good ferroelectric properties (remanent polarization $\sim$17 $μ$C/cm$^2$, PUND; coercive field $\sim$150 kV/cm), alongside weak ferromagnetic behavior at room temperature (remanence 1.30 emu/cm$^3$; coercive field 90 Oe). Photovoltaic measurements demonstrated a robust, polarization-dependent photoresponse under 403 nm monochromatic laser illumination, achieving Jsc values between $\pm$20 $μ$A/cm$^2$. This compelling observation confirms the intrinsic coupling between ferroelectric polarization and photovoltaic effects, highlighting the considerable promise of these single-phase multiferroic thin films for advanced photovoltaic and optoelectronic memory applications.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在SrTiO3（001）衬底上用脉冲激光沉积法制备的高取向0.5Pb(Zr0.52Ti0.48)O3-0.5Pb(Fe0.5Nb0.5)O3多铁薄膜，该薄膜表现出优异的结晶质量、良好的铁电性和弱铁磁性，并在403 nm激光下实现了强极化依赖的光伏响应，证明了铁电极化与光伏效应的内在耦合，在先进光电和光电子存储器应用中具有潜力。
AI.motivation: 探索具有铁电极化与光伏效应强耦合的新型多铁材料，以推动下一代光电器件的发展。
AI.method: 采用脉冲激光沉积法在具有SrRuO3底电极的SrTiO3（001）衬底上生长高度取向的0.5Pb(Zr0.52Ti0.48)O3-0.5Pb(Fe0.5Nb0.5)O3多铁薄膜，并对其结构、铁电、铁磁及光伏性能进行表征。
AI.result: 薄膜呈单一钙钛矿相且（001）取向，结晶质量优良；室温下具有良好的铁电性（剩余极化~17 μC/cm²，矫顽场~150 kV/cm）和弱铁磁性（剩磁1.30 emu/cm³，矫顽场90 Oe）；在403 nm激光下表现出强健的极化依赖光伏响应，Jsc达±20 μA/cm²。
AI.conclusion: 观察结果证实了铁电极化与光伏效应之间存在内在耦合，这些单相多铁薄膜在先进光伏和光电子存储器应用中具有重要前景。

title: Disentangling the origin of degradation in perovskite solar cells via optical imaging and Bayesian inference
summary: Machine learning and computational inference, coupled with experimental data, promise to significantly accelerate our rate of learning in most scientific disciplines. In this study, we develop tools that connect microscopic observations to macroscopic device behaviour, a capability that is essential for accelerating the design of durable energy materials. To this end, we introduce a novel approach that integrates photoluminescence imaging with drift diffusion simulations to understand operation and degradation in fully fabricated perovskite solar cells. By employing Bayesian inference, we generate "inferred maps" of parameters that govern recombination processes present in devices. We track these parameter maps while the devices are aged (70 °C, full spectrum sunlight) to analyse their temporal evolution during degradation. Notably, our approach allows us to distinguish between degradation occurring at the hole or electron transporting layer interface, or within the bulk. Our analysis reveals pronounced spatially non-uniform degradation, with significant macroscopic heterogeneity observed in the optoelectronic parameter maps. We pinpoint the greatest degradation observed in specific regions to stem from the perovskite/transport layer interfaces. Finally, we demonstrate that an amino-silane molecular passivation treatment suppresses this degradation, highlighting its specific role in enhancing device stability. Our approach offers valuable insights for future device fabrication and is a clear exemplification of how advanced Bayesian inference can significantly increase the value of experimental data.

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一种结合光致发光成像、漂移扩散模拟和贝叶斯推断的方法，通过生成重组过程参数的“推断图”来追踪钙钛矿太阳能电池在老化过程中的时空退化，并成功区分了界面与体相退化机制，验证了氨基硅烷钝化处理对抑制退化的作用。
AI.motivation: 将微观观测与宏观器件行为连接起来，加速耐久性能源材料的设计，特别是理解钙钛矿太阳能电池在运行和退化中的机制。
AI.method: 整合光致发光成像与漂移扩散模拟，结合贝叶斯推断生成器件中重组过程参数的“推断图”，并在老化条件（70°C，全光谱光照）下追踪参数图的时空演化。
AI.result: 该方法能够区分退化发生在空穴/电子传输层界面还是体相；发现了显著的空间非均匀退化，最大退化源于钙钛矿/传输层界面；氨基硅烷分子钝化处理能有效抑制该退化。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为未来器件制造提供了宝贵见解，展示了高级贝叶斯推断如何显著提升实验数据的价值，是加速能源材料设计的有力范例。

title: A first-principles approach for predicting infrared optical properties of solids
summary: We present a simplified formalism for predicting infrared optical constants from first-principles calculations. Addressing limitations of the widely used four-parameter semi-quantum Lorentz model, the proposed approach bridges the gap between the harmonic three-parameter model and full self-energy-based methods. By incorporating essential anharmonic effects including four-phonon scattering and phonon renormalisation, the model provides an efficient and accurate alternative while maintaining low computational cost. The frequency-dependent refractive indices of MgO and rutile TiO$_2$ are computed and compared with experimental data, demonstrating good quantitative agreement. The framework offers a practical approach for predicting optical properties of materials across a wide range of materials.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种简化但从第一性原理预测红外光学常数的方法，通过纳入四声子散射和声子重整化等非谐效应，在保持低计算成本的同时，实现了对MgO和金红石TiO₂折射率的准确预测，架起了谐波三参数模型与全自能方法之间的桥梁。
AI.motivation: 现有广泛使用的四参数半量子Lorentz模型存在局限性，需要一种在计算效率与预测精度之间取得更好平衡的方法。
AI.method: 提出一种简化的形式化方法，在谐波三参数模型基础上纳入关键的非谐效应（四声子散射和声子重整化），避免了全自能方法的计算复杂性。
AI.result: 对MgO和金红石TiO₂的频率依赖折射率进行了计算，与实验数据相比显示出良好的定量一致性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为预测广泛材料的红外光学性质提供了一种实用且高效的方法。

title: Thickness-Independent Quantum Geometric Responses Driven by Interlayer Antiferroic Coupling
summary: Two-dimensional ferroic materials exhibit rich and intriguing physical phenomena, but their response properties generally depend sensitively on thickness, requiring precise layer-number control and thereby limiting practical applications. Here, we propose a general strategy for realizing thickness-independent quantum geometric responses through symmetry engineering induced by interlayer antiferroic coupling. Using spatial-dependent symmetry analysis, we show that thickness-independent behavior emerges when the symmetry breaking required for a given response is generated by interlayer antiferromagnetic (AFM) or antiferroelectric (AFE) coupling, without invoking topological mechanisms. Our first-principles calculations predict that multilayer MnS in the G-type AFM configuration exhibits a surface-dominated anomalous Hall effect, whose thickness-independent behavior can be significantly influenced by the stacking order. We further propose design principles for achieving thickness-independent anomalous and nonlinear Hall effects driven by interlayer AFE coupling, and suggest potential applications in distinguishing magnetic structures. Our findings open a new route towards robust functional devices based on antiferroic materials.

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过层间反铁性耦合实现厚度无关的量子几何响应的通用策略，利用对称性工程避免了对精确层厚控制的依赖，并在MnS多层膜中预测了厚度无关的反常霍尔效应。
AI.motivation: 二维铁性材料的响应特性通常严重依赖厚度，需要精确控制层数，这限制了实际应用。作者希望找到一种不依赖厚度的量子几何响应实现方案。
AI.method: 采用空间依赖的对称性分析，提出通过层间反铁磁（AFM）或反铁电（AFE）耦合引入对称性破缺的策略。结合第一性原理计算验证MnS多层膜中的G型反铁磁构型。
AI.result: 在G型反铁磁MnS多层膜中预测了表面主导的反常霍尔效应，其厚度无关行为受堆叠顺序显著影响。还提出了基于层间反铁电耦合实现厚度无关反常和非线性霍尔效应的设计原则。
AI.conclusion: 该研究开辟了基于反铁性材料实现鲁棒功能器件的新路径，可在无需精确层厚控制条件下获得稳定的量子几何响应，并可用于区分磁结构。

title: Polarizing ultrathin ferroelectric BaTiO3 films through interfacial layer polarization
summary: An important requirement for the integration of ferroelectric thin films into devices is deterministic control of the polarization state in films of only a few unit cells in thickness. Here, we utilize the charged atomic planes of (001)-oriented SmNiO$_3$ (SNO) buffer layers as a polarizing template to stabilize the polarization in ferroelectric BaTiO$_3$ (BTO) model system thin films. We show that an upwards (downwards) oriented polarization is achieved by selection of the [SmO]$^+$ ([NiO$_2$]$^-$) buffer termination. Most importantly, the charged atomic planes of SNO suppress the depolarizing-field-induced critical thickness in BTO, and we record the emergence of a net polarization in our BTO films from the first unit cell deposited. Our experiments, guided by density-functional-theory (DFT) calculations, further highlight the impact of charged defects on the polarizing effectiveness of the SNO buffer. Specifically, oxygen vacancies counteract the polarizing field of the negatively charged, [NiO$_2$]$^-$-terminated surface of the SNO buffer. Our findings provide important insights into the interplay of defect chemistry and polarizing interfaces to stabilize ferroelectric polarization down to the single-unit-cell limit.

AI.tldr: 本文利用SmNiO₃缓冲层的带电原子面作为极化模板，在BaTiO₃薄膜中实现了从第一个单胞开始的自发极化，并成功抑制了去极化场导致的临界厚度效应。
AI.motivation: 实现超薄铁电薄膜（仅几个单胞厚度）中极化状态的确定性控制，是铁电薄膜器件集成的重要需求。
AI.method: 采用(001)取向的SmNiO₃(SNO)缓冲层，通过选择[SmO]⁺或[NiO₂]⁻的终止面来诱导BaTiO₃(BTO)薄膜向上或向下的极化，并结合DFT计算分析。
AI.result: SNO缓冲层的带电原子面成功抑制了BTO中去极化场导致的临界厚度，从第一个沉积的单胞起就观测到净极化；同时发现氧空位会削弱[NiO₂]⁻终止面的极化效果。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了缺陷化学与极化界面之间的相互作用，为在单胞尺度稳定铁电极化提供了重要见解。

title: Physics-informed time-series forecasting of perovskite photoluminescence stability
comment: The first three listed authors contributed equally to the manuscript
summary: Accelerated ageing using elevated temperatures and illumination is one of the most common methods to rapidly study the stability of novel semiconductor materials. However, as the pace of materials discovery continues to accelerate, even faster stability evaluations are needed. A physics-informed time-series forecasting algorithm designed to predict the long-term photoluminescence stability of metal halide perovskites is presented. A diverse experimental dataset of 167 metal halide perovskites is collected, including different crystallinities and compositions. These are stressed using heat and light, while the photoluminescence (PL) is monitored. The >86k collected PL spectra are featurized using a physics-informed model, and a hybrid CNN-LSTM model is trained to forecast the PL intensity during degradation of samples unseen during model training. Notably, the approach generalizes across the material groups and outperforms baseline benchmarks. Furthermore, the physics-based featurization ensures explainability, enabling analysis to identify critical stability descriptors for given predictions. It is expected that this approach will be adapted to other types of time-series data and enables a pathway to significantly reduce experimental testing times.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种物理信息驱动的时间序列预测算法，利用混合CNN-LSTM模型预测金属卤化物钙钛矿的长期光致发光稳定性。基于167种材料、超过86k个PL光谱的实验数据集，该方法在未见样本上表现出良好的泛化能力，并具备可解释性，有望显著缩短实验测试时间。
AI.motivation: 现有的加速老化测试（高温+光照）虽能快速评估材料稳定性，但随着新材料发现速度加快，需要更快的稳定性评估方法，因此本文旨在开发一种预测算法来替代耗时的实验测量。
AI.method: 收集167种金属卤化物钙钛矿（不同结晶度和组分）在热和光应力下的PL光谱数据（>86k条），利用物理信息模型对光谱进行特征化，然后训练混合CNN-LSTM模型预测退化过程中的PL强度变化。
AI.result: 该方法在不同材料组别间具有良好的泛化能力，性能优于基线基准模型。物理信息特征化确保了模型的可解释性，可识别关键稳定性描述符。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有望推广到其他类型的时间序列数据，并为显著减少实验测试时间提供了可行路径。

title: The phase composition and physical properties of melt-quenched multicomponent alloy FeCoNiB0.7Si0.3Be
comment: Accepted manuscript. 12 pages, 3 figures. Published in Functional Materials 32(3) (2025), 418-422. DOI: 10.15407/fm32.03.418
summary: The structure and physical properties of the high-entropy multicomponent alloy FeCoNiB0.7Si0.3Be in the as-cast and melt-quenched states were studied. The cooling rate of the melt-quenched films was estimated to be approximately 10^6 K/s based on the film thickness. X-ray analysis revealed a multiphase structure, including a BCC-type ordered phase (structural type B2) and intermetallic compounds (Fe, Ni, Co)2B. In melt-quenched samples, the fraction of the B2 phase increased, leading to a decrease in microhardness from 10400 MPa in the as-cast state to 8900 MPa in the melt-quenched state. Magnetic studies confirmed the ferromagnetic nature of the FeCoNiB0.7Si0.3Be alloy. The coercive field of melt-quenched samples (17500 A/m) was significantly higher than that of the as-cast ones (5200 A/m), which is attributed to structure refinement and an increased level of microstresses.

AI.tldr: 研究了高熵多组分合金FeCoNiB0.7Si0.3Be在铸态和熔淬态下的结构和物理性能。熔淬冷却速率约10^6 K/s。铸态为多相结构（B2有序相+金属间化合物），熔淬后B2相增多，显微硬度从10400 MPa降至8900 MPa。合金呈铁磁性，熔淬态矫顽力（17500 A/m）显著高于铸态（5200 A/m），归因于结构细化和微应力增加。
AI.motivation: 探究高熵合金FeCoNiB0.7Si0.3Be在不同冷却速率（铸态与熔淬态）下的相结构演变及其对力学和磁性能的影响。
AI.method: 采用X射线衍射分析相结构，通过膜厚估算熔淬冷却速率（~10^6 K/s），测试显微硬度和磁性（矫顽力）。
AI.result: 铸态为多相结构（B2有序相+（Fe,Ni,Co）2B金属间化合物）；熔淬后B2相增多，显微硬度从10400 MPa降至8900 MPa；熔淬态矫顽力（17500 A/m）远高于铸态（5200 A/m）。
AI.conclusion: 熔淬快冷促进B2相形成，降低了硬度但显著提高了矫顽力，结构细化和微应力增加是磁性能变化的主因。

title: Dopant-induced modifications of the optical properties of GaSe
summary: Doping plays a crucial role in tailoring the electronic, optical, and magnetic properties of semiconductors, enabling control of carrier dynamics and the formation of functional states for optoelectronic applications. We investigate the influence of Fe dopants on the optical properties of GaSe crystals using photoluminescence (PL) spectroscopy under varying excitation power, temperature, and magnetic field. Fe incorporation introduces multiple sharp emission lines in addition to intrinsic excitonic transitions, including free and localised excitons. Power- and temperature-dependent measurements indicate that these emission features are associated with Fe-related dopant centres (Fe-bound excitons). Magneto-PL measurements reveal two distinct families of $g$-factors, enabling the identification of intrinsic excitonic transitions and Fe-induced defect states. These results demonstrate that Fe doping creates optically and magnetically active centres in GaSe, providing insight into defect-related excitonic processes and their potential relevance for magneto-optoelectronic and quantum photonic applications.

AI.tldr: 本文通过光致发光（PL）光谱研究Fe掺杂对GaSe晶体光学性质的影响，发现Fe掺杂引入多个尖锐发光峰（Fe束缚激子），并通过变功率、变温和磁光PL实验区分了本征激子跃迁和Fe诱导缺陷态，揭示了两种不同的g因子家族，表明Fe掺杂创造了光学和磁性活性中心，为磁光电子学和量子光子学应用提供了见解。
AI.motivation: 掺杂是调控半导体电子、光学和磁性质的关键手段，但Fe掺杂对GaSe光学性质的具体影响机制尚不明确，特别是Fe相关缺陷态与激子过程的关联有待深入研究。
AI.method: 采用光致发光（PL）光谱技术，结合变激发功率、变温度和变磁场条件，系统研究Fe掺杂GaSe晶体的发光特性。
AI.result: Fe掺杂引入多个与Fe束缚激子相关的尖锐发射线；变功率和变温实验确认这些发射来源于Fe掺杂中心；磁光PL测量发现两种不同的g因子家族，分别对应本征激子跃迁和Fe诱导缺陷态。
AI.conclusion: Fe掺杂在GaSe中创造了光学和磁性活性中心，为理解缺陷相关激子过程提供了见解，并在磁光电子学和量子光子学中具有潜在应用价值。

title: Symmetry-electronic fingerprints reveal competing magnetic phases in two-dimensional materials
summary: Two-dimensional magnets offer compelling platforms for spintronics and quantum technologies, yet predicting their magnetic ground states, moments, and anisotropy remains challenging. This limitation primarily arises because existing machine-learning representations encode chemical environments without capturing the symmetry or exchange physics that govern magnetism. In this work, we introduce the symmetry-electronic fingerprint (SEF), a physically interpretable representation that encodes crystallographic symmetry operations, Wyckoff-site geometry, together with site-resolved electronic structure. Combined with ensemble learning with random forests, the SEF accurately classifies magnetic ordering while regressing moments alongside anisotropy energies while simultaneously resolving the distinct regimes of itinerant Stoner ferromagnetism from localized superexchange. What sets the SEF-trained models apart is that regions of elevated model uncertainty are not a failure but a diagnostic, identifying materials where these mechanisms compete. First-principles calculations on Co- and Ni-based halides and oxides confirm that these regions correspond to genuine near-degenerate FM and AFM phases with magnetic frustration, suppressed anisotropy, and emergent non-collinear ordering. By encoding symmetry together with exchange physics directly into the representation unlike conventional descriptors, the SEF transforms model uncertainty into a compass pointing toward two-dimensional materials where small perturbations drive transitions between collinear, frustrated, or non-collinear magnetic phases.

AI.tldr: 本文提出对称性-电子指纹（SEF）表示方法，通过编码晶格对称性、Wyckoff位点几何与电子结构，结合随机森林集成学习，实现了二维磁体磁性基态、磁矩和磁各向异性的准确预测，并将模型不确定性转化为识别竞争磁性相（如铁磁与反铁磁共存、磁阻挫、非共线序）的诊断工具。
AI.motivation: 现有机器学习表示方法仅编码化学环境，未能捕捉控制磁性的对称性和交换物理，导致二维磁体的磁性基态、磁矩和磁各向异性难以预测。
AI.method: 提出对称性-电子指纹（SEF），编码晶体学对称操作、Wyckoff位点几何和位点分辨电子结构；结合随机森林集成学习，同时完成磁有序分类、磁矩回归和各向异性能量回归，并区分巡游Stoner铁磁性与局域超交换机制。
AI.result: SEF模型能准确分类磁有序、回归磁矩和各向异性能；模型不确定性高的区域对应FM和AFM近简并态、磁阻挫、抑制的各向异性和非共线序；Co/Ni基卤化物和氧化物的第一性原理计算验证了这些预测。
AI.conclusion: 将对称性和交换物理直接编码到表示中，模型不确定性不再是失败指标，而是识别二维磁体中微小扰动即可驱动共线、阻挫或非共线磁相变的关键材料的指南针。

title: Lone-Pair-Induced Lattice Softness Enables Ultralow Thermal Conductivity in Hybrid Organic-Inorganic Perovskite GuaPbI$_3$
summary: Thermoelectric cooling efficiency is fundamentally constrained by lattice thermal conductivity, yet conventional inorganic thermoelectrics have approached a performance plateau despite extensive nanostructural engineering. Organic thermoelectrics possess intrinsically low thermal conductivity but often suffer from limited and morphology-sensitive charge transport. Here, we introduce a lone-pair-driven materials design strategy based on chemically induced lattice softness in hybrid organic-inorganic perovskites. A physics-guided symbolic-regression-based machine-learning framework identifies a lone-pair-dominated compositional regime associated with suppressed lattice thermal conductivity and selects GuaPbI3 as a candidate material. Mechanochemical synthesis yields crystalline GuaPbI3 with an ultralow room-temperature thermal conductivity of kappa = 0.088 W m^-1 K^-1. Electrical measurements reveal electronically active, bias-dependent bulk conduction pathways despite strong phonon suppression, while impedance spectroscopy confirms bulk-dominated transport. Density functional theory calculations indicate weakly dispersive valence bands, valence-conduction asymmetry, and localized electrostatic microenvironments from charge redistribution within the lattice. Calculated transport coefficients suggest strong sensitivity of carrier transport to chemical potential, while Lorenz-number analysis indicates deviations from conventional Wiedemann-Franz behavior near the band edges. These results support a picture in which lone-pair-rich hybrid frameworks generate soft and electronically heterogeneous lattice environments that suppress phonon transport while preserving electronically accessible states. This work establishes chemically induced lattice softness as a design principle for ultralow-thermal-conductivity hybrid materials.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于孤电子对驱动的化学诱导晶格软化策略，在杂化有机-无机钙钛矿GuaPbI3中实现了超低热导率（0.088 W m⁻¹ K⁻¹），同时保留了电学传输路径，为开发低热导率混合材料提供了新设计原则。
AI.motivation: 传统无机热电材料通过纳米结构工程已接近性能瓶颈，而有机热电材料虽具有本征低热导率但电荷传输受限且对形态敏感。亟需一种新设计策略来同时实现低热导率与良好电学传输。
AI.method: 采用物理引导的符号回归机器学习框架识别孤电子对主导的组分区间，筛选出GuaPbI3候选材料；通过机械化学合成制备晶体；结合DFT计算、阻抗谱和Lorenz数分析等手段进行表征。
AI.result: GuaPbI3室温热导率仅0.088 W m⁻¹ K⁻¹；电学测量显示存在偏压依赖的体相导电通路；DFT揭示弱色散价带、价导带不对称性及局域静电场微环境；Lorenz数分析表明近带边偏离Wiedemann-Franz定律。
AI.conclusion: 孤电子对富集的杂化框架能产生软且电子异质的晶格环境，在抑制声子传输的同时保留电子可访问态。化学诱导的晶格软化可作为超低热导率混合材料的设计原则。

title: Tuning perpendicular magnetic anisotropy in ultra-low damping Li$_{0.5}$Al$_{x}$Fe$_{(2.5-x)}$O$_4$ thin films for efficient spin-orbit torque switching
summary: Ultra-thin magnetic insulator films that simultaneously exhibit ultra-low magnon damping, perpendicular magnetic anisotropy (PMA), and low spin-orbit torque (SOT) switching current densities are highly desirable, albeit challenging, for next-generation spintronic technologies that exploit spin waves to transport information without dissipative charge currents. Here, we demonstrate this combination of properties in ferrimagnetic spinel Li$_{0.5}$Al$_{x}$Fe$_{(2.5-x)}$O$_4$ (LAFO) thin films. Through this model system, we find that PMA can be tuned by epitaxial strain in the form of chemical composition and substrate choice and that low SOT switching current densities correlate with small but finite PMA. Ultra-low damping is stabilized primarily by having only Fe$^{3+}$ as magnetically active cations with secondary effects due to increased disorder from Al substitution distribution. SOT efficiency is governed by interface quality and independent of chemical composition. By varying the Al concentration, we systematically tune the saturation magnetization and magnetic anisotropy while maintaining ultra-low Gilbert damping parameters as low as $2\times10^{-4}$ and composition-independent damping-like SOT efficiencies. We identify an optimal composition LAFO x=0.7 (Li$_{0.5}$Al$_{0.7}$Fe$_{1.8}$O$_4$), which combines ultra-low damping, stable PMA with small anisotropy fields, and low critical current densities for SOT switching, establishing it as a promising material platform for energy-efficient spin-wave and spintronic devices.

AI.tldr: 本文在铁磁性尖晶石Li₀.₅AlₓFe₂.₅₋ₓO₄（LAFO）超薄膜中，同时实现了超低磁振子阻尼、垂直磁各向异性（PMA）和低自旋轨道转矩（SOT）开关电流密度。通过调节Al浓度和衬底应变，系统优化了磁性各向异性和饱和磁化强度，保持吉尔伯特阻尼低至2×10⁻⁴，并确定了最优成分LAFO x=0.7，为自旋波和自旋电子学器件提供了有前景的材料平台。
AI.motivation: 超薄磁绝缘体薄膜若同时具备超低磁振子阻尼、垂直磁各向异性（PMA）和低自旋轨道转矩（SOT）开关电流密度，对于利用自旋波无耗散传输信息的下一代自旋电子学技术至关重要，但实现这一组合极具挑战。
AI.method: 以铁磁性尖晶石Li₀.₅AlₓFe₂.₅₋ₓO₄（LAFO）薄膜为模型体系，通过外延应变（化学组分与衬底选择）调控PMA；通过仅保留Fe³⁺作为磁性活性阳离子实现超低阻尼，Al取代引起的无序产生次级效应；通过界面质量调控SOT效率。
AI.result: 成功实现了超低吉尔伯特阻尼（低至2×10⁻⁴）、成分无关的类阻尼SOT效率、可调的PMA与饱和磁化强度。发现低SOT开关电流密度与微小但有限的PMA相关，阻尼主要受Fe³⁺单一磁性阳离子调控，SOT效率由界面质量决定。
AI.conclusion: 确定了最优成分LAFO x=0.7（Li₀.₅Al₀.₇Fe₁.₈O₄），该材料同时具备超低阻尼、稳定且小各向异性场的PMA，以及低SOT开关临界电流密度，是高效自旋波与自旋电子学器件的理想材料平台。

title: Cepstral Analysis to accelerate Green-Kubo thermal conductivity calculations of Metal-Organic Frameworks
summary: Metal-organic frameworks (MOFs) are promising porous materials for applications such as gas storage and separation, where heat transport can critically affect device performance. However, reliable computational prediction of their thermal conductivities remains challenging. In particular, equilibrium molecular-dynamics-based Green-Kubo (GK) simulations, as the most widely used approach, are severely affected by statistical noise. Moreover, they rely on multiple ambiguous, user-defined parameters, which hinder transferability and automation. Here, we demonstrate for metal-organic frameworks that cepstral analysis in combination with GK simulations provides a robust route to massively mitigate these problems, while simultaneously reducing the required sampling times. This is shown for three prototypical frameworks, MOF-5, HKUST-1, and ZIF-8, employing machine-learned moment tensor potentials trained on DFT reference data. In contrast to conventional, direct GK analysis, which shows erratic convergence and strong sensitivity to ad hoc choices of parameters, the cepstral approach yields stable results across a wide range of correlation lengths and achieves convergence within about 1-2 ns of total sampling time. This establishes cepstral analysis base Green-Kubo simulations combined with machine-learned potentials as an efficient, reproducible and automation-ready framework for near ab initio accuracy prediction of thermal transport in MOFs and other complex low-thermal-conductivity materials.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将cepstral分析与Green-Kubo分子动力学模拟相结合，并借助机器学习势函数，实现了对MOF材料热导率的稳健、高效且可自动化的预测，显著优于传统直接GK方法。
AI.motivation: MOF材料的热传输性能对器件性能至关重要，但基于平衡分子动力学的Green-Kubo模拟受统计噪声和用户定义参数模糊性的严重困扰，导致结果不可靠、难以迁移和自动化。
AI.method: 将cepstral分析（倒谱分析）与Green-Kubo模拟相结合，使用机器学习训练的moment tensor势函数（基于DFT参考数据），对MOF-5、HKUST-1和ZIF-8三种代表性框架进行热导率计算。
AI.result: 与传统直接GK分析相比，cepstral方法在广泛的关联长度范围内结果稳定，总采样时间约1-2 ns即可收敛，而传统方法收敛波动大且对参数选择高度敏感。
AI.conclusion: cepstral分析结合机器学习的Green-Kubo模拟为MOF及其他复杂低热导率材料提供了一种高效、可重复、可自动化的近ab initio精度热输运预测框架。

title: Morphology control and low-temperature magnetotransport in chiral 2D perovskite R-(MBA)$_2$PbI$_4$
summary: Two-dimensional chiral hybrid perovskites, such as R/S-(MBA)\textsubscript{2}PbI\textsubscript{4}, are leading candidates for realizing and studying chirality-dependent charge and spin transport. However, their prohibitive in-plane resistance has precluded the electrical characterization. Here, we overcome this bottleneck by engineering the thin-film morphology of the chiral perovskite $R\text{-(MBA)}_2\text{PbI}_4$, enabling the first robust lateral device integration. In Hall-bar geometries, we demonstrate Hall measurements under dark conditions, unambiguously identifying p-type conduction with a Hall mobility of $\sim 0.2 \text{cm}^2 \text{V}^{-1} \text{s}^{-1}$ and a carrier density of $\sim 3\times10^{14} \text{ cm}^{-2}$, parameters previously inaccessible in this class of materials. Furthermore, we observe enhanced magnetoresistance along transport paths crossing grain boundaries, highlighting the strong influence of morphology on in-plane transport. This work demonstrates in-plane magnetotransport, enabling future investigations of the fundamental mechanisms of chirality-induced spin selectivity (CISS) and accelerating the integration of chiral materials into functional spintronic devices.

AI.tldr: 本文通过工程化手性钙钛矿R-(MBA)₂PbI₄的薄膜形貌，首次实现了其横向器件集成，在Hall-bar结构中测量了霍尔效应，获得了p型导电、霍尔迁移率~0.2 cm²/V·s、载流子浓度~3×10¹⁴ cm⁻²等关键电学参数，并观察到晶界处增强的磁电阻效应，为研究手性诱导自旋选择性（CISS）机制和开发自旋电子器件奠定了基础。
AI.motivation: 二维手性杂化钙钛矿（如R/S-(MBA)₂PbI₄）是研究手性依赖的电荷和自旋输运的领先候选材料，但其过大的面内电阻阻碍了电学表征，因此需要克服这一瓶颈来实现横向电学测量。
AI.method: 通过工程化手性钙钛矿R-(MBA)₂PbI₄的薄膜形貌，将其集成到Hall-bar几何结构中，在暗条件下进行霍尔测量。
AI.result: 首次实现了稳定的横向器件集成，明确了p型导电机制，测得霍尔迁移率约0.2 cm²/V·s，载流子密度约3×10¹⁴ cm⁻²；发现沿穿越晶界的输运路径出现增强的磁电阻效应。
AI.conclusion: 该工作实现了面内磁输运测量，为未来研究手性诱导自旋选择性（CISS）的基本机制以及将手性材料集成到功能化自旋电子器件中铺平了道路。
